CN223699560U.title: Shaft special for electric spark discharge machining machine
CN223699560U.abstract: The utility model discloses a special shaft for an electric spark discharge machine, and belongs to the technical field of electric spark machining. The shaft special for the electric spark discharge machining machine comprises a shaft sleeve, a steering mechanism is arranged at the bottom end of the shaft sleeve and comprises an outer cylinder, the bottom end of the shaft sleeve is fixedly connected with the outer cylinder, the bottom end of the outer cylinder is rotationally connected with a rotating table, a swing seat is hinged to the bottom end of the rotating table, an electrode tip is installed at the bottom end of the swing seat, and the electrode tip is fixedly connected with the rotating table. A first motor is installed on one side of the outer wall of the rotating table, the output end of the first motor is in transmission connection with one side of the swing seat, a second motor is installed in the outer cylinder, the output end of the second motor is in transmission connection with the top end of the rotating table, and a water cooling pipeline is arranged in the shaft sleeve. The water cooling pipeline comprises a spiral copper pipe, and a water inlet connector and a water outlet connector are installed at the two ends of the spiral copper pipe respectively.

CN223699566U.title: Two-axis numerical control spindle head for automatic threading numerical control electric spark linear cutting machine tool
CN223699566U.abstract: A two-axis numerical control spindle head for an automatic threading numerical control wire cut electrical discharge machining tool is characterized in that the two-axis numerical control spindle head is provided with a Z-axis movement mechanism and a W-axis movement mechanism, the axis of a Z axis and the axis of a W axis are arranged in parallel in the Z direction, the Z-axis movement mechanism comprises a Z-axis carriage seat, a Z-axis carriage, a Z-axis guide rail pair, a wire guide pipe positioning mechanism and a Z-axis servo driving mechanism, the W-axis movement mechanism comprises a W-axis carriage, a W-axis guide rail pair, a wire guide pipe, a wire electrode feeding mechanism and a W-axis servo driving mechanism, and in the working state, the wire electrode section which moves downwards in the Z direction and penetrates through a wire guide hole of the wire guide pipe to a wire guide nozzle on the machine tool lower wire arm is the cutting working section of the wire electrode. According to the scheme, the Z-axis carriage can drive the wire guide pipe positioning mechanism installed at the lower end of the Z-axis carriage to do Z-direction digital linear motion, meanwhile, the W-axis carriage can also drive the electrode wire feeding mechanism and the wire guide pipe to do Z-direction motion, the normal cutting requirement of a machine tool is met, and the automatic wire penetrating requirement of the machine tool is also met.

CN223699559U.title: Wire pressing device of electric spark numerical control wire cutting machine tool
CN223699559U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of electric spark numerical control wire cutting machine tools, and discloses a wire pressing device of an electric spark numerical control wire cutting machine tool. The wire pressing device comprises a supporting plate, a second supporting plate is arranged under the supporting plate, a plurality of guide wheels are arranged on the right sides of the supporting plate and the second supporting plate, and protection mechanisms are arranged on the sides, close to each other, of the supporting plate and the second supporting plate; the protection mechanism comprises a fixing block, a hidden groove is formed in the fixing block, translation grooves are formed in the inner walls of the front side and the rear side of the hidden groove correspondingly, translation blocks are arranged in the translation grooves correspondingly, and a shifting block is jointly connected between the two translation blocks. And a shifting block is pushed by a reset spring to move in a hidden groove in a fixed block, so that the situation that the surface of a guide wheel set is damaged due to the fact that the electric spark wire is broken from the middle section between the vertical plate and the lower supporting plate and collides with the guide wheel set on the vertical plate and the lower supporting plate when the electric spark wire is broken is avoided.

BG5154U1.title: SENSOR-BASED REMOTE FLAME PROPAGATION SYSTEM
BG5154U1.abstract: The present utility model will find application in systems for a sensor-based approach for remote flame propagation, providing encrypted two-way communication and galvanic separation between control and power circuits. The created system for sensor-based remote flame propagation includes a temperature sensor (1), connected to a first single-board computer (2), which via a Wi-Fi module (3) is connected to a proxy server (4). The proxy server (4) via a second Wi-Fi module (6) is connected to a second single-board computer (5), controlling a relay module (7), activating a solenoid valve (8), connected to a high-voltage generator (9), creating an electric spark. The Wi-Fi modules (3 and 6) used for connecting to the global Internet network are Wi-Fi tethering modules.

CN121161082A.title: Preparation method of high-strength, high-hardness and ablation-resistant CuWTaTeAl gradient nano composite material
CN121161082A.abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method of a high-strength, high-hardness and ablation-resistant CuWTaTeAl gradient nano composite material. The method comprises the following steps: 1, mechanically mixing Cu80Al20 spherical coated powder, Cu90W10 spherical coated powder, WTe2 alloy powder, Ta powder and Cu powder, and then carrying out ball milling and mixing; 2, performing SPS (spark plasma sintering); thirdly, after soaking treatment, multi-pass hot rolling deformation is carried out, and then quenching treatment is carried out; and 4, annealing heat treatment. The binary spherical coating powder, the alloy powder and the elementary substance powder are subjected to ball milling and mixing to achieve uniform distribution of all elements, high-melting-point W and Ta are added to improve the ablation-resistant temperature of the composite material, large-scale copper dendrite powder is added to form gradient distribution nanocrystals, the proportion of all the elements is controlled, the lattice distortion degree is increased, and the ablation-resistant temperature of the composite material is improved. The high-strength, high-hardness and ablation-resistant CuWTaTeAl gradient nano composite material is suitable for the fields of contacts, switches, electrical connectors, resistance welding electrodes and the like.

CN121155541A.abstract: The invention discloses a metal oxide loaded composite membrane as well as a preparation method and application thereof, and belongs to the technical field of membrane materials. In the composite membrane, a metal oxide is loaded on the membrane, the metal oxide is iron-aluminum oxide composite nanoparticles, and the membrane is a polyacrylonitrile fiber membrane; the composite membrane is prepared through electric spark ablation, electrostatic spinning and the like, and the distribution uniformity of the metal oxide on the polyacrylonitrile fiber membrane is effectively improved, so that the composite membrane has excellent adsorption performance and stability.

CN121164267A.title: Direct-reading spectrometer dual-mode detection method and system based on single-focus time-sharing excitation
CN121164267A.abstract: The invention provides a direct-reading spectrometer dual-mode detection method and system based on single-focus time-sharing excitation, and the method comprises the steps: sequentially applying a high-voltage spark pulse and a low-voltage arc pulse to a to-be-detected sample in the same excitation focus, separating a composite light signal generated by excitation into visible light and ultraviolet light, and respectively carrying out the signal collection; the gain of a trace element detection channel is adjusted in real time based on the main quantity element spectral line intensity, and high-energy and low-energy signal dynamic balance is achieved; and carrying out quantitative calculation on the corrected spectral line intensity, and detecting the contents of major elements and trace elements. Single-focus time-sharing excitation is adopted, the excitation processes of main elements and trace elements are integrated in the same focus, and time consumption required by focus switching and independent excitation of the trace elements in a traditional bifocus system is avoided by precisely controlling time-sharing sequential excitation of high-voltage sparks and low-voltage arcs; and the production efficiency and the quality control level are effectively improved.

CN121156685A.title: Preparation method of Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube
CN121156685A.abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method of a Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube. The method comprises the following steps: 1, preparing a Ta-W-Hf alloy tube blank by adopting an electric spark perforation process and linear cutting; secondly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy pipe blank is subjected to cold rolling, and a Ta-W-Hf alloy cold-rolled pipe blank is obtained; thirdly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy cold-rolled tube blank is subjected to acid pickling and then subjected to ball spinning, and a Ta-W-Hf alloy thin-walled tube is obtained; and fourthly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy thin-walled tube is subjected to annealing treatment, and the Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube is obtained. According to the method, the tube blank is prepared through electric spark perforation and linear cutting, the thinner thin-walled tube with the large diameter-thickness ratio is prepared in combination with cold rolling, then the inner diameter, the outer diameter and the wall thickness are further reduced through ball spinning, the surface quality is improved, and the Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube which is high in size precision, uniform in wall thickness and free of scratches on the inner surface and the outer surface is obtained. The method is suitable for aerospace field.

CN121156412A.title: Automatic wire threading device and method for medium-speed wire cutting machine tool
CN121156412A.abstract: The invention discloses an automatic wire threading device and method for a medium-speed wire cutting machine tool, and relates to the technical field of medium-speed wire cutting machine tools. The automatic wire threading device comprises a metal wire, a hook feeding motor, a wire guide pipe system, a wire clamping mechanism, a control system, a machine tool body and a supporting frame fixedly connected with the top of the machine tool body; an upper rear godet wheel, a lower rear godet wheel and an upper front godet wheel are fixedly connected to one side of the supporting frame, a supporting plate is arranged on one side of the lower rear godet wheel, and a lower front godet wheel is fixedly connected to one end of the supporting plate. Depending on a precise sensor and complex electric control is replaced with determined mechanical guiding and pure mechanical grabbing. The hook runs in the closed wire guide pipe, the path of the hook is physically constrained, the grabbing action is completed by a mechanical structure, and the influence of severe factors such as cutting fluid greasy dirt coverage and electromagnetic interference generated by electric spark machining which are common on a machine tool site is fundamentally eliminated. Therefore, the threading success rate and the threading stability of the device are remarkably improved in an industrial actual environment.

CN121166476A.title: Nginx log monitoring analysis system and method, terminal and medium
CN121166476A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of Web service operation and maintenance, and particularly provides an Nginx log monitoring and analyzing system and method, a terminal and a medium. Performing standard log format configuration on the main configuration file of the target component and the application program; standard logs are collected in real time and transmitted to a storage layer; the method comprises the following steps: acquiring first target log data from a storage layer, performing real-time index calculation and anomaly detection according to the first target log data based on Flink, acquiring second target log data from the storage layer, generating historical comparison data and anomaly detection according to the second target log data by using Spark, generating a dynamic threshold range according to the Holt-Winters model which is updated at regular time so as to carry out anomaly detection; and performing visual display and alarm processing according to a log analysis result. According to the method, the fault positioning time is shortened, the operation and maintenance efficiency is improved, the abnormal false alarm rate is reduced, and the comprehensive requirements of real-time performance and accuracy are met.

CN121161092A.title: Green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy as well as preparation method and application thereof
CN121161092A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of copper alloy materials, in particular to a green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy and a preparation method and application thereof. The invention provides a green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy which comprises the following chemical components in percentage by mass: 4.0-5.0% of titanium, 0.5-0.6% of cobalt and the balance of copper and inevitable impurities. The green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy is prepared by adopting the processes of vacuum melting, casting molding, homogenizing treatment, single hot rolling, solution treatment and aging treatment, and has the characteristics of high strength (the tensile strength is greater than or equal to 1000MPa), high elongation (greater than or equal to 30% IACS), high conductivity (greater than or equal to 10% IACS), no magnetism (less than or equal to 5Nt/m) and no spark in collision; the requirements of tools in flammable and explosive environments on safety, mechanical performance and static electricity conduction are completely met, and the risk of beryllium pollution is thoroughly eliminated.

CN223685111U.abstract: The utility model discloses a pipe fitting polishing and cleaning all-in-one machine which comprises an operation table, three sets of transmission structures are arranged on the top of the operation table from front to back, a polishing structure is arranged above the set of transmission structures located on the front face, and a dust collecting device is arranged above the transmission structures located on the front face. CN121155223A.title: Flue gas pipeline spark trapping device
CN121155223A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of industrial kilns, and relates to a smoke pipeline spark trapping device. A spark trapping pipe (2) is arranged in a flue gas pipeline (1), the interior of the spark trapping pipe (2) is of a hollow structure, the upper end and/or the lower end of the spark trapping pipe (2) are/is of an open structure, a plurality of flue gas trapping holes (8) are formed in the side, facing flue gas inlet, of the spark trapping pipe (2), and unburnt spark particles enter the spark trapping pipe (2) from the flue gas trapping holes (8). Unburnt spark particles are extinguished under the action of mutual impact, extinguished smoke particles flow out from the opening structure at the upper end and/or the lower end of the spark trapping pipe (2), and a gap is reserved between the top of the spark trapping pipe (2) and the inner wall of the top of the smoke pipeline (1). According to the smoke pipeline spark trapping device, the spark trapping capacity of a dust removal system can be effectively improved, so that long-term safe and reliable operation of a dust remover is guaranteed, and safety risks are avoided and reduced.

CN121156409A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-energy electric spark milling gradient ring punching gas chip removal device and method, and belongs to the technical field of electric spark machining. The high-energy electric spark milling gradient ring punching gas chip removal device comprises a hollow electrode, and the electrode is connected with a main shaft system of an electric spark machine tool through a clamp; the electrode is provided with an annular flushing nozzle mechanism; the annular flushing nozzle mechanism comprises an air flushing nozzle, a circumferential driving assembly and an axial driving assembly; an annular air chamber is arranged in the air flushing spray head, a plurality of partition plates are evenly arranged in the annular air chamber in the circumferential direction and divide the annular air chamber into a plurality of air cavities, each air cavity corresponds to one air inlet, and an air outlet used for spraying air to a machining gap between an electrode and a workpiece is formed in the bottom end of each air cavity. And the spraying angles of the air outlets in the air cavities are different. When a liquid medium is flushed in electric spark milling, multi-directional, flexible and adjustable airflow coverage is carried out on a machining position, high-energy discharge corrosion removal is achieved, the problem that fused corrosion removal objects are accumulated in a machining gap is effectively solved, and efficient chip removal is achieved.

CN121159254A.title: Method for optimizing thermoelectric performance and stability of copper sulfide material through macroscopic insulation structure
CN121159254A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of thermoelectric materials, and discloses a method for optimizing thermoelectric performance and stability of a copper sulphide material by a macroscopic insulation structure, which comprises the following steps: firstly, preparing Cu1.96S precursor powder by using a mechanical alloying method, then putting the Cu1.96S precursor powder into a graphite grinding tool, and carrying out heat treatment on the Cu1.96S precursor powder to obtain a Cu1.96S/Cu1.96S composite material; meanwhile, macroscopic insulation structure frames are added layer by layer according to different arrangement modes (including up-and-down hole arrangement and left-and-right hole arrangement); and the obtained Cu1. 96S + macroscopic insulation structure frame mixed powder is subjected to spark plasma sintering, and then the block composite material is obtained. The directional migration process of Cu ions in Cu1.96S in the sintering process can be influenced by the added macroscopic insulation structure frame, migration of part of the Cu ions is hindered, the problem that the migration rate and the electrical property of the material are deteriorated due to invalidation caused by the copper ions is solved, the heat conductivity is slightly reduced, and finally the thermoelectric property and the stability are synchronously improved. The problem that an existing cuprous sulfide thermoelectric material is difficult to obtain excellent thermoelectric performance and stability at the same time is solved.

GEAP202516508A.title: INDOOR AIR IONIZER
GEAP202516508A.abstract: An ionizer comprises a case 4 equipped with air flow inlet 12 having the shape of triangular prism dividing incoming air flow into two flows 1, two ionized air flow emitters 9 and 10, and mesh electrodes are placed in the channels 5 and 6 formed between them, and grounded grid componentry 7 and 8 in conjunction with electrodes to produce ions of uniform concentration, furthermore, mesh electrodes are covered with conductive carbon nanofibers, and power converter is designed to provide different voltage modes on each grid electrode to charge the nanofibers with static electric charge, and produce positive ions on one side and negative ions on another. Or by spot welding using welding machine or by spraying nanofibers onto thin layer of conductive monomer preapplied to the surface of metal mesh, and by orienting the surface of the fibers in a direction using an electrostatic field and fixing them in this position until polymerization is complete.

CN121137397A.title: Tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy and preparation method and application thereof
CN121137397A.abstract: The invention discloses a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy and a preparation method and application thereof, and relates to the technical field of non-ferrous metal powder metallurgy materials. The invention provides a preparation method of a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy, which comprises the following steps: (1) mixing copper, tungsten and/or tungsten oxide, and then carrying out airflow crushing treatment to obtain mixture powder; (2) carrying out cold isostatic pressing treatment on the mixture powder to obtain a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank; (3) the tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is subjected to hydrogen reduction treatment, and a reduced tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is obtained; and (4) the reduced tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is subjected to spark plasma sintering treatment, and the tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy is obtained. The prepared alloy block has better heat-conducting property, electrical conductivity and mechanical property.

CN121137645A.title: Synthesis method and application of bimetallic phosphide electrolyzed water catalyst
CN121137645A.abstract: The invention discloses a synthesis method and application of a bimetallic phosphide electrolyzed water catalyst, and belongs to the technical field of inorganic synthesis and electro-catalysis. The bimetallic phosphide Fe < 3-x > Co < x > P (x = 0-1.5) catalyst is prepared through high-energy ball milling and spark plasma sintering technologies; firstly, micron-sized transition metal powder Fe and Co and red phosphorus are subjected to high-energy ball milling treatment to obtain a uniform Co/Fe/FexP mixture precursor, then the mixture precursor is prepared into a homogeneous Fe3-xCoxP (x = 0-1.5) catalyst with a tetragonal phase Fe3P crystal structure through a spark plasma rapid sintering method, and the catalyst shows excellent oxygen evolution reaction performance. The synthesis method is simple, low in cost, efficient and high in controllability, the second element Co can be promoted to be effectively doped into the Fe3P crystal, the doping amount of the Co element is accurately regulated and controlled, the Fe3P-based catalytic material of a pure-phase structure is rapidly synthesized, and the application space is wide.

CN121142954A.title: Pre-charged high-voltage power supply and control method
CN121142954A.abstract: The invention discloses a pre-charged high-voltage power supply and a control method, and relates to the technical field of high-voltage power supply control. The method comprises the following steps: calculating an average dust concentration, an average spark rate and a change coefficient thereof by collecting a dust concentration sequence and a power supply spark rate sequence of a space before and after dust removal in real time; dynamically generating a plurality of groups of adjustment amplitudes of proportion, integration and differential parameters based on comparison of historical and current working conditions; the optimization step length is adaptively configured by calculating a control conflict coefficient, adaptive optimization is carried out on PID control parameters by adopting an iterative optimization algorithm, and finally optimal control parameters for keeping efficient and stable operation under complex working conditions are obtained. According to the method, the problems that fixed parameter PID control cannot adapt to dynamic working conditions and multi-target conflicts are difficult to balance are effectively solved, and the dust removal efficiency, the operation stability and the energy consumption economy are remarkably improved.

CN121130075A.title: G-C3N4/Bi2Se3 nano heterojunction and preparation method thereof
CN121130075A.abstract: The invention relates to the field of drug-resistant bacterium infection, and discloses a g-C3N4/Bi2Se3 nano heterojunction and a preparation method thereof.The preparation method comprises the steps that firstly, melamine powder is heated and calcined at the constant temperature, after a tubular furnace is naturally cooled, spark plasma sintering is conducted, nitrogen vacancies are introduced at the same time, and a blocky high-defect g-C3N4 material is obtained; grinding into powder, adding deionized water for ultrasonic treatment to obtain a first suspension, performing centrifugal treatment, freeze-drying the supernatant, and adding into an ethylene glycol solvent to obtain a second suspension; eG, polyvinylpyrrolidone, Bi (NO3) 3.5 H2O and Na2SeO3 are mixed and stirred, and the second turbid liquid is added; the preparation method comprises the following steps: adding Bi2Se3 into a reaction kettle, heating while stirring, adding a hydroxylamine EG solution, cooling to room temperature after reaction, centrifuging, washing, and carrying out vacuum drying on a precipitate to obtain a g-C3N4/Bi2Se3 nano heterojunction; the problems that in the prior art, the catalytic efficiency is low, a collaborative mechanism does not achieve structure-function integrated design, the performance of a key functional material is limited, and the structural stability and biological suitability of the material are insufficient are solved.

CN121132283A.title: Discharge plasma sintering-brazing integrated device and process for thermoelectric device connection
CN121132283A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of welding, and particularly discloses a discharge plasma sintering-brazing integrated device and process for connection of thermoelectric devices, the discharge plasma sintering-brazing integrated device comprises a hearth, a carrying mechanism, a pressure head mechanism, a base mechanism, a clamping mechanism and a feeding pipe, and the interior of the hearth communicates with a vacuum pump. The pressure head mechanism comprises a pressure head body, a driving assembly, a graphite boss and an upper graphite column; the base mechanism comprises a base body and a lower graphite column; the feeding pipe is obliquely inserted into the hearth downwards from the outside of the hearth; the clamping mechanism comprises a clamping device and a power assembly. The carrying mechanism comprises a carrying platform and a transmission assembly. A mechanical system and an electric control unit are deeply fused, the spark plasma sintering-brazing integrated device is created for the first time, the sintering process and the brazing process are seamlessly integrated, the production efficiency and the yield are both improved, and the comprehensive manufacturing cost of thermoelectric devices is comprehensively reduced.

CN121153102A.title: Flash lamp
CN121153102A.abstract: A flash lamp (1) is provided with: a lamp housing (2) in which an inert gas is sealed and which is sealed; a cathode (20) and an anode (30) that generate arc discharge; a trigger electrode (40) that performs preliminary discharge prior to the arc discharge; and a plurality of spark elements (60, 70) that promote ionization for arc discharge initiation. The plurality of spark elements (60, 70) are disposed separately from each other. At least one of the plurality of spark elements (60, 70) can be disposed in the vicinity of the cathode (20). Further, a plurality of trigger electrodes (40) can be provided.

CN121152538A.title: Hot extrusion process and hot extrusion die based on discharge plasma sintering or hot pressing sintering
CN121152538A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of electronic materials, and discloses a hot extrusion process based on spark plasma sintering or hot pressing sintering, which comprises the following steps: preparing a columnar block cast ingot, pretreating the columnar block cast ingot, and then putting the pretreated columnar block cast ingot into a hot extrusion die with a taper extrusion channel for spark plasma sintering or hot pressing sintering, the discharge plasma sintering stage or the hot pressing sintering stage comprises at least one heating and preorder heat preservation stage, a pressure extrusion stage and a subsequent heat preservation stage, and demolding after sintering to obtain a nail-shaped block sample; and carrying out post-treatment on the nail-shaped block sample to obtain the fine-grain strong-texture block material. The invention further provides a hot extrusion die. The process disclosed by the invention has the advantages of high efficiency and energy conservation, and the same or even better performance compared with the traditional process can be obtained only by one-time hot extrusion sintering, so that the production efficiency is greatly improved, and the energy is saved.

CN121132800A.title: Cutting device for project lamp machining and using method thereof
CN121132800A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of cutting devices, in particular to a cutting device for project lamp machining and a using method of the cutting device. A cutting assembly is mounted on the cutting equipment body and comprises a sliding seat fixed to the upper end face of the cutting equipment body, a mounting base block is slidably arranged on the sliding seat, a sliding frame is welded to the upper end face of the mounting base block, and a mounting block is slidably arranged on the sliding frame. The protection assembly arranged on the device effectively shields the front portion of the cutting machine through an L-shaped baffle, spark splashing can be reliably blocked in the cutting process, and damage to operators and peripheral equipment is avoided. Meanwhile, the baffle is hung on the mounting block through the first guide rod and forms a linkage relation with the cutting machine, the baffle does not need to be independently operated during feeding, the mounting block and the cutting machine are driven to move upwards only by driving the first hydraulic cylinder to stretch, the baffle can be synchronously driven to ascend, the operation process is simplified, and it is ensured that the protection function can be used at any time; and the practicability is obviously enhanced.

CN121149794A.title: Inflatable spark gap
CN121149794A.abstract: The present invention relates to an inflatable spark gap for protecting an electrical installation, the inflatable spark gap comprising: an electrically insulating body; two electrodes fixed to the electrically insulating body and spaced apart from each other in the main direction; an inter-electrode space formed in the electrically insulating body between the two electrodes, the inter-electrode space being sealed in a gas-tight manner; two connection terminals intended to be able to electrically connect the inflatable spark gap to an electrical facility, the two connection terminals being electrically connected to a respective one of the two electrodes; the inter-electrode space comprises a diverting channel defining a propagation trajectory (T) for the arc, the cross-sectional area of the diverting channel being between 2 mm < 2 > and 8 mm < 2 >, the diverting channel extending transversely or obliquely to the main direction over at least a portion of the length of the diverting channel; and a gas sealed in the inter-electrode space, the gas being selected from the group consisting of argon Ar, neon Ne, nitrogen N2, hydrogen H2, helium He, and mixtures thereof.

US20260042043A1.title: HYDROPHOBIC FILTER MEDIUM
US20260042043A1.abstract: A filter medium is provided that comprises a nonwoven layer. The nonwoven layer comprises a sizing agent and a hydrophobic, stiffening binder resin. The nonwoven layer may be corrugated. A method producing a filter medium is also provided. The filter medium may be a fuel filter, oil filter, air filter, or an electric discharge filter. The filter medium, after corrugation, pleating, or embossing, avoids or minimizes water ingress, while still allowing the filter medium to maintain its structural and filtration properties.

US20260018389A1.title: SUBSTRATE TREATMENT APPARATUS AND SUBSTRATE TREATMENT METHOD
US20260018389A1.abstract: The present invention provides an apparatus for treating a substrate. The apparatus for treating a substrate may include: a process treatment unit that provides a treatment space in which the substrate is treated; and a plasma generation unit that is provided above the process treatment unit and generates plasma from a process gas. The plasma generation unit includes: a plasma chamber having an electric discharge space formed therein; a shield unit surrounding the exterior of the plasma chamber; an antenna which surrounds the shield unit from the outside of the shield unit and to which high-frequency power is applied; and a connecting unit electrically connecting the shield unit and the antenna.

US20260015239A1.abstract: A system for manufacturing a nanomaterial may include a first electrode; a second electrode spaced apart from the first electrode by a gap; and a chamber configured to enclose the first electrode, the second electrode, and a liquid. US20260061486A1.title: METAL PARTICLES AND METHOD FOR PREPARATION THEREOF USING ELECTROEROSION DISPERSION
US20260061486A1.abstract: In one aspect, a method for fabricating metal particles is disclosed, which includes adding a plurality of metallic elements into a plasma reactor comprising a circulating fluid and two electrodes, evaporating the metallic elements to form metal vapor using plasma generated by at least one electric discharge pulse between the electrodes; and condensing the metal vapor to form metal particles. In some embodiments, the metal particles comprise metal oxide particles. In some embodiments, the metal particles are useful as part of pharmaceutical compositions or dietary supplements.

KR102906121B1.title: Electric discharge machine for precision process
KR102906121B1.abstract: 본 발명은 전극의 세팅시간을 줄이고 작업능률을 향상시킬 수 있는 정밀 세팅 및 가공을 포함하는 정밀 가공용 방전 가공기에 관한 것으로서, 상측의 헤드부(100)와 하측의 거치부(200)로 구분하면서 헤드부(100)와 거치부(200) 사이가 개방된 형태로 형성된 본체부, 상기 본체부에 구비되며 피가공물(20)이 거치되는 거치부(200), 상기 거치부(200)의 상면에 돌출 형성되어 상기 피가공물(20)이 지지되며 전류가 흐르는 음극전극부, 상기 거치부(200)의 상면을 마주하도록 배치되며 전류가 흐르는 양극전극부(180) 및, 상기 양극전극부(180)를 고정하면서 높이 및 좌우이동을 제어하는 지그이동부(100a)를 구성하며, 상기 지그이동부(100a)는, 동력부(110)와 상기 동력부(110) 하측에 위치한 높이조절부(120)와 상기 높이조절부(120) 하측에 위치한 연결체(140)와 상기 연결체(140) 하측에 위치한 지그회전체(150)와 상기 지그회전체(150)의 하측에 위치한 전극지그(160)와 상기 전극지그(160) 하측에 위치한 소정의 수직길이로 형성된 전극(170)과 상기 전극(170)의 하측에 위치하여 피가공물의 가공부위에 접촉하는 제1전극팁(183)으로 구성된 양극전극부(180)를 포함하며, 상기 양극전극부(180)는, 전극(170) 하단에 연결되는 수직형 제1몸체(181-1)와 상기 제1몸체(181-1)의 일측면 하단에서 수평으로 연결되면서 상면 중앙에서 하면 중앙으로 관통된 제1체결공(181-3)이 형성된 제2몸체(181-2)로 구성된 제1지지부(181)와, 상기 제1지지부(181)의 제2몸체(181-2) 하부에 배치되어 제1체결공(181-3)의 위치에 대응된 제2체결공(182-1)이 형성되면서 하면 중앙에 제1전극팁(183)의 상부를 결속하는 제1삽입공이 형성된 전극연결체(182)를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 한다.

WO2026009424A1.title: DISPOSITIF DE COMMANDE POUR MACHINE D'ÉLECTROÉROSION PAR FIL ET PROCÉDÉ DE COMMANDE POUR USINAGE PAR ÉLECTROÉROSION PAR FIL
WO2026009424A1.abstract: This control device for a wire electric discharge machine includes: a movement control unit that causes a wire electrode to move along a machining path; a voltage control unit that controls a machining power supply and applies a machining voltage across poles; and a machining control unit that maintains a non-discharge state in which discharge does not occur between the poles until the wire electrode reaches a first position on the machining path, that, upon the wire electrode reaching the first position, gradually increases the discharge density so that the discharge density of the discharge becomes a set value set as a machining condition, and that, upon the wire electrode reaching the first position again, gradually decreases the discharge density to achieve a non-discharge state.

KR102906122B1.title: Electric discharge machining system for precision setting and process
KR102906122B1.abstract: 본 발명은 전극의 세팅시간을 줄이고 작업능률을 향상시킬 수 있는 정밀 세팅 및 가공을 포함하는 방전 가공 시스템에 관한 것으로서, 외관을 형성하는 본체부, 상기 본체부에 구비되며 피가공물이 거치되는 거치부(200), 상기 거치부(200)의 상면에 돌출 형성되어 상기 피가공물이 지지되며 전류가 흐르는 음극전극부, 상기 거치부(200)의 상면을 마주하도록 배치되며 전류가 흐르는 양극전극부(180), 상기 양극전극부(180)를 고정하면서 높이 및 좌우이동을 제어하는 지그이동부(100a) 및, 상기 피가공물의 방전가공을 제어하는 방전제어모듈을 포함하는 방전가공기가 구비되며, 상기 방전제어모듈은, 피가공물의 3D 도면을 이용하여 상기 피가공물의 방전 가공을 자동으로 수행하는 방전가공프로그램과, 상기 피가공물의 방전 가공시 상기 방전가공기에 설치된 센서들의 측정값을 화면에 표시하고 동작 상태를 실시간으로 화면에 표시하는 모니터와, 상기 방전가공기의 동작을 제어하는 신호를 입력하는 동작스위치 입력부와, 상기 방전가공프로그램을 저장하고, 상기 피가공물의 방전 가공 측정값을 시간대별로 저장하는 메모리 및, 상기 동작스위치 입력부의 입력 신호와 상기 방전가공프로그램에 따라 방전 가공을 자동 수행을 제어하는 제어부로 구성되며, 상기 지그이동부(100a)는, 동력부(110)와 상기 동력부(110) 하측에 위치한 높이조절부(120)와 상기 높이조절부(120) 하측에 위치한 연결체(140)와 상기 연결체(140) 하측에 위치한 지그회전체(150)와 상기 지그회전체(150)의 하측에 위치한 전극지그(160)와 상기 전극지그(160) 하측에 위치한 소정의 수직길이로 형성된 전극(170)과 상기 전극(170)의 하측에 위치하여 피가공물의 가공부위에 접촉하는 제1전극팁(183)으로 구성된 양극전극부(180)를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 한다.

CN223718489U.title: Multi-angle discharge tool jig structure
CN223718489U.abstract: The utility model discloses a multi-angle discharging tool jig structure which comprises a working table, supporting plates are arranged on the two sides of the top of the working table, a workpiece body is arranged at the position, close to the top, between the two supporting plates, and a plurality of through holes are formed in the positions, close to the top, of the supporting plates. Side edge plates are arranged at the positions, close to the tops, of the opposite sides of the two supporting plates correspondingly, the two sides of the workpiece body are fixedly connected with embedded rods correspondingly, and a two-way air cylinder is fixedly installed in the center of the top of the workbench. According to the multi-angle discharging tool jig structure, an embedded rod penetrates through a through hole and a side edge plate, and a first internal thread fixing sleeve is in threaded connection with a first external thread groove, so that accurate position fixing of a workpiece body is achieved, and the problem of insufficient stability caused by a single fixing mode of a traditional tool jig is solved through the design; and particularly, when a superhard material or a workpiece with a complex shape is machined, tiny position deviation can be effectively prevented, and the precision and efficiency of electric discharge machining are remarkably improved.

CN121194571A.title: Film layer structure for improving UV attenuation of solar cell and preparation method and application thereof
CN121194571A.abstract: The invention provides a film layer structure for improving UV attenuation of a solar cell and a preparation method and application of the film layer structure. The film layer structure comprises a silicon substrate; the first silicon-oxygen layer, the Al-O layer and the second silicon-oxygen layer are stacked on at least one side surface of the silicon substrate in the direction away from the silicon substrate; wherein SiO2/Al-O interface layers are formed between the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer and the second silica layer and between the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer and the first silica layer through interface bonding. The two independent SiO2/Al-O interface layers rich in tetrahedron coordination Al are formed on the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer, and the method has the following effects that 1) cooperative charging and charge density maximization are achieved, vertical coulomb repulsion between the two interface layers is effectively shielded, the upper interface and the lower interface can be almost independently charged, and a breakthrough of the charge density is achieved; (2) a dual passivation mechanism is adopted, electric discharge passivation and enhanced field effect passivation are achieved, and the cell efficiency and the UV reliability are both considered;

CN223684579U.title: Fine hole electric discharge machine for die punching
CN223684579U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of die punching, and discloses a fine hole electric discharge machine for die punching, which comprises a cooling liquid tank, the top end of the cooling liquid tank is fixedly connected with a support plate, one end of the support plate is fixedly connected with a cross-shaped sliding table, the bottom end of the cross-shaped sliding table is fixedly connected with a pulse power supply, and the pulse power supply is fixedly connected with a motor. The pulse power source is arranged in the cooling liquid box, the output end of the pulse power source is fixedly connected with an electrode wire, a cooling liquid circulating mechanism is arranged at the top end of the cooling liquid box, and the cooling liquid circulating mechanism comprises a water pump fixedly connected with the cooling liquid box. After cooling is completed, cooling liquid flows into the liquid leakage groove along the inclined liquid drainage groove and flows back to the cooling liquid box again after impurities are filtered out through the filter screen, cyclic utilization of the cooling liquid is achieved, and the use cost of the cooling liquid is saved.

US2025385119A1.title: ELECTROSTATIC CHUCK
US2025385119A1.abstract: An electrostatic chuck 10 includes a dielectric substrate 100, an internal electrode 140 provided inside the dielectric substrate 100, a base plate 200 in which a through hole 230 is formed, a power supply member 400 that is a member for supplying power to the internal electrode 140 and is inserted through the through hole 230, and an insulating member 500 arranged between an inner surface of the through hole 230 and the power supply member 400. CN223652951U.title: Feeding device with quantitative function for sow breeding
CN223652951U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of livestock breeding, in particular to a sow breeding feeding device with a quantitative function, which comprises a bottom groove, the top of the bottom groove is connected with a feed storage box through bolts, a vertical plate is welded at the top of the bottom groove, and the surface of the vertical plate is connected with an electric telescopic rod through bolts. The opposite sides of the vertical plates are slidably connected with baffles, and the tops of the electric telescopic rods are connected with connecting rods through bolts. Feed is stored through the feed storage box, then the first electric discharge valve is opened, the feed in the feed storage box is input into the feed weighing groove through the feed guide shell and the first electric discharge valve, plastic in the feed weighing groove is weighed through the weighing device, and after feeding is completed, the feed is conveyed into the feed storage box through the feed guide shell and the first electric discharge valve. The electric telescopic rod does telescopic motion to drive the connecting rod and the baffle to move up and down, water in the water tank is pumped out through the pump body and then sprayed out through the spray head, and the water sprayed out through the spray head flushes the top of the bottom groove.

CN223670353U.title: Automatic focusing device of electric discharge machine
CN223670353U.abstract: The embodiment of the utility model provides an automatic focusing device of an electric discharge machine. The automatic focusing device comprises a supporting frame; the stabilizing groove is formed in the bottom end of the supporting frame; the buoy sensor is arranged in the stabilizing tank and is used for detecting liquid level change and transmitting information; the adjusting rod is used for adjusting the position of the focusing device; the driving motor is mounted on the supporting frame and drives the adjusting rod to move up and down so as to realize automatic focusing; the stabilizing groove comprises a multi-layer structure with a plurality of shock absorption interlayers; wherein a liquid level adjusting mechanism is arranged on one side of the stabilizing tank and comprises a liquid level adjusting valve, a liquid discharging pipe, a backflow pipe, a temporary storage tank and a circulating pump, the liquid level adjusting valve is used for discharging oil liquid in the stabilizing tank into the temporary storage tank, and meanwhile the circulating pump injects the temporarily stored oil liquid into the stabilizing tank again through the backflow pipe. Through the scheme of the embodiment of the invention, the problems of liquid level fluctuation and instability caused by instantaneous high voltage generated by arc discharge in the electric spark machining process can be solved.

CN223656178U.title: Graphite electrode mechanism for processing thin stand column
CN223656178U.abstract: The utility model provides a graphite electrode mechanism for processing a thin stand column, which relates to the technical field of graphite electrode processing equipment, and comprises a quick clamping component, the quick clamping component is used for clamping a graphite electrode, and the graphite electrode is used for carrying out electric discharge processing on parts; the rapid clamping assembly is connected with the connecting assembly, the connecting assembly comprises a frame body and an extension rod body, the frame body is rotationally connected with a lifting adjusting nut, the lifting adjusting nut is in threaded connection with the extension rod body, and the rapid clamping assembly is connected to the lower end of the extension rod body. The utility model has the beneficial effects that the extension rod body ascends and descends along with the rotation of the lifting adjusting nut; when a product in the shape of a thin stand column is machined or a deep hole is punched in the product, the graphite electrode cannot make contact with the surface of the product any more along with the deepening of the machined depth of the product, and at the moment, the lifting adjusting nut is rotated to lower the extension rod body, so that the size range of the product machined by the equipment is larger; and the use flexibility of the equipment is improved.

CN223642907U.abstract: The utility model provides a small backwater device with adjustable flow for a wire cut electric discharge machine, which comprises a backwater valve device box body, the top of the backwater valve device box body is fixedly connected with a support beam through a fixing screw, and the bottom of the backwater valve device box body is provided with a first cylinder; the bottom end of a piston rod of the first air cylinder is fixedly connected with a first connecting plate, the top of the first connecting plate is fixedly connected with a first locking nut, and the inner side wall of the first locking nut is in threaded connection with a first connecting piece. CN223670355U.abstract: The utility model discloses a lifting type electric discharge machine which comprises a machine frame, a frame fixedly connected in the machine frame, a mounting barrel fixedly connected in the frame, a piston plate slidably connected in the mounting barrel, a machining table fixedly connected to the top of the piston plate, and an air cylinder fixedly connected to the bottom of the frame. CN223604799U.title: Deep vulcanization treatment device for silica gel tube
CN223604799U.abstract: The utility model provides a deep vulcanization treatment device for a silica gel tube. The deep vulcanization treatment device for the silica gel tube comprises a barrel body, an electric discharge hopper, an air inlet pipe, a first cross, a transmission column and the like, the interior of the barrel body is hollow; an electric discharge hopper is arranged at the bottom of the barrel; an air inlet pipe is arranged at the lower part of the outer ring surface of the barrel; a first cross is arranged at the lower part of the inner ring surface of the barrel body, and the first cross is hollow; a transmission column is rotationally connected to the first cross. CN223588479U.title: Graphite electrode mechanism for deep curved surface machining
CN223588479U.abstract: The utility model provides a graphite electrode mechanism for deep curved surface machining, which relates to the technical field of graphite electrode machining equipment and comprises a quick clamping component, the quick clamping component is used for clamping a graphite electrode, and the graphite electrode is used for performing electric discharge machining on parts; the upper end of the connecting assembly is connected with the horizontal adjusting table, the upper end of the horizontal adjusting table is connected with the rotary adjusting table, and the upper end of the rotary adjusting table is connected with the machine tool. The device has the beneficial effects that the rotary adjusting table and the horizontal adjusting table are arranged, so that the circumference angle of the graphite electrode on an XY plane can be adjusted, and the angle of the graphite electrode on an XYZ space can be adjusted; according to the multi-angle fine adjustment graphite electrode, fine adjustment of multiple angles can be carried out when the graphite electrode carries out electric discharge machining on a product, so that more accurate positioning can be achieved when the product with a deep curved surface is machined, and the machining quality and the size precision of the product are guaranteed.

CN121082997A.title: Rapid cutting machining method through electric discharge machine
CN121082997A.abstract: The invention provides a rapid cutting machining method utilizing an electric discharge machine, which comprises the following steps of: installing a pulse power supply on an electric discharge machine tool, and installing a wire tool needing to be cut on an electric discharge wire cutting machine tool; an electric spark cutting device is installed at a proper position of an electric spark wire cutting machine tool, an anode of a pulse power supply is connected with an anode electrode plate, a cathode of the pulse power supply is connected with a cathode electrode plate, and the anode electrode plate and the cathode electrode plate are both in contact connection with a wire tool; and the electric spark machine is started, and electric spark wire cutting machining is conducted on the conductive workpiece. The machining device is combined with the electric spark machining technology, the machining device is simple, reliable and convenient to use, the machining device is easily corroded under the action of electric sparks, the cutting machining speed is doubled, and the electric spark wire cutting machining speed is greatly increased; meanwhile, the loss of the electrode wire is correspondingly reduced and delayed, the service life of the electrode wire is prolonged, and the machining forming precision is improved.

CN121100038A.abstract: According to an aspect of the present disclosure, a control device for controlling an electric discharge machine is provided with: an electric discharge machining unit for performing electric discharge machining on a workpiece in a machining fluid; and a filter that removes machining chips contained in the machining fluid, the control device comprising: a determination unit that determines whether or not the workpiece is made of an aluminum-based material; and a control unit that, when the determination unit determines that the workpiece is made of the aluminum-based material, performs control for adding a chemical agent that reduces the electrical resistivity of the working fluid to the working fluid.

CN223616904U.title: Electric discharge machine for precision mold machining
CN223616904U.abstract: The utility model discloses an electric discharge machine for precision mold machining. The electric discharge machine comprises a machine base, a double-shaft moving mechanism, a box body, a workpiece clamping jig and an electric discharge machine head. The box body is connected with the double-shaft moving mechanism, a containing cavity is formed in the box body, the workpiece clamping jig is arranged in the containing cavity, and the workpiece clamping jig is used for positioning and placing a mold accessory to be subjected to electric spark machining; the electric spark machine head is arranged above the box body and used for conducting electric discharge machining on the mold accessories on the workpiece clamping jig, and the workpiece clamping jig comprises a bottom plate, a rotating air cylinder, a pressing plate and a negative pressure cavity base. According to the utility model, a mold accessory to be subjected to electric spark machining can be placed on the workpiece clamping jig, the double-shaft moving mechanism can drive the box body to move in the X-axis direction and the Y-axis direction so as to ensure that the mold accessory is accurately positioned in the machining range of the electric spark machine head, and the electric spark machine head can corrode materials of the mold accessory in a pulse discharge mode, so that the machining efficiency is improved. Therefore, electric spark machining is achieved.

TW202536905A.abstract: Embodiments provide an electromagnetic lens, a scanning electron microscope, and an electron beam inspection apparatus, which are capable of suppressing an electric discharge between an objective lens and a target object. CA3244128A1.title: SOLUTION PROCESSING APPARATUS AND SOLUTION PROCESSING METHOD
CA3244128A1.abstract: A solution processing apparatus (1) includes a main body portion (20A) having a gas flow channel (30) through which a gas flows, an electric discharge section (40) for generating plasma discharge within the gas flow channel (30), and a power supply section (9) for applying voltage between a first electrode (42) and the second electrode (44) of the electric discharge section (40). The power supply section (9) periodically applying AC voltage between the first electrode (42) and the second electrode (44), thereby causing the electric discharge section (40) to perform a discharge operation in such a manner that current flowing through a solution (90) has a waveform composed of waveforms which are alternately repeated and represent positive current values and negative current values, respectively, the average of the current values becomes substantially 0 in each period, and the absolute value of a positive peak current value becomes larger than the absolute value of a negative peak current value in each period.

CN223572159U.title: Cooling device of numerical control electric discharge machine
CN223572159U.abstract: The utility model discloses a numerical control electric discharge machine cooling device in the technical field of electric discharge machines, which comprises a machine frame, a cooling device, a cooling device, a cooling device and an electric discharge machine, and is characterized in that the machine frame is provided with a processing machine head and a blocking frame, and a bearing seat is arranged in the blocking frame; the cooling mechanism comprises an annular pipe shell arranged in the blocking frame, an annular opening is formed in the inner circumferential side of the annular pipe shell, an annular sealing plate is rotationally arranged in the annular opening, a plurality of spraying pipes communicate with the inner circumferential side of the annular sealing plate in an array mode, and a plurality of supporting plates are arranged on the side, located on the annular pipe shell, of the annular sealing plate in an array mode; a water tank is arranged on the machine frame, a water drainage pipe is communicated between the blocking frame and the water tank, a water inlet pipe is communicated between the water tank and the annular pipe shell, and the water inlet pipe is communicated with a water pump arranged on the machine frame.

CN120985279A.title: Machining method of supercharger turbine shell runner mold
CN120985279A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of die machining, in particular to a machining method of a supercharger turbine shell runner die, which comprises the following steps of: roughly machining an inner cavity of a die blank by adopting a low-speed fast feeding machining method and a cavity milling machining method; a machining strategy combining streamline machining and equal-height machining is adopted, and a high-speed cutting machining mode is adopted for semi-finish machining; an equal-height machining method is adopted for the side wall of the mold, a streamline machining method is adopted for the bottom and the runner face of the mold, 45-degree oblique angle streamline machining is adopted, and bottom back gouging is conducted on right-angle sides through a milling cutter; in the tongue area of the runner mold and the area where the machining precision cannot be guaranteed, the tail end and the sharp corner of the runner are subjected to electric discharge machining treatment through an electrode; performing deburring treatment on the parting surface of the mold; and a blue-light 3D scanner is used for detecting the molding surface of the mold. The machining method combining streamline machining, equal-height machining and electric spark machining is adopted, the partition finish machining technology is adopted, and the machining precision is improved.

CN120985278A.title: Die machining process optimization method based on CNC (computer numerical control) engraving
CN120985278A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of mold manufacturing, in particular to a CNC engraving-based mold machining process optimization method. Comprising the following steps that CNC rough machining is conducted on a mold core; a secondary grinding forming cutter is adopted, and a mesh structure and a hot-pressing column structure on the mold core are directly machined through the CNC engraving and milling technology; wherein the distance between the mesh structures is smaller than or equal to 1.6 mm, the diameter of each hot-pressing column structure is 1.5 mm +/-0.05 mm, and the height of each hot-pressing column structure is 0.5 mm +/-0.02 mm; and electrode design, electric discharge machining and mold saving procedures are omitted, and integrated forming of the mold core from roughing to finish machining is achieved. Defects in the prior art cause a die enterprise to fall into difficulty in cost and quality balance: a high-price strategy loses order competitiveness, and a low-price strategy faces a cost upside-down risk. Therefore, the invention provides an innovative processing method which can simplify the process, reduce the cost and guarantee the precision.

CN120914960A.title: Vehicle-mounted high-voltage battery pack charging and discharging power supply system and control method thereof
CN120914960A.abstract: The invention discloses a vehicle-mounted high-voltage battery pack charging and discharging power supply system and a control method thereof, and relates to the technical field of vehicle-mounted high-voltage energy storage, and the method comprises the steps: a system wakes up a request for low voltage, and obtains working parameters; monitoring the voltage value of the storage battery, part faults and CAN (Controller Area Network) communication; if the voltage of the storage battery is normal, the system works normally and parts do not have faults, low-voltage standby is prompted; the system normally requests high voltage or requests charging; monitoring high-voltage interlocking, fault conditions and bus voltage during pre-charging; when the high-voltage state of the system is normal and high voltage is normally increased, pure electric discharge is prompted; after high voltage is applied, the system normally requests direct current charging, alternating current charging or inversion discharging. The high-voltage battery pack is adopted to meet the high-voltage direct-current electricity utilization requirement of the system and the load requirement, various charging and discharging application scenes such as direct-current charging and alternating-current discharging and direct-current discharging and alternating-current discharging are supported, the discharging or charging mode is flexibly recognized, and double-gun charging and discharging can be effectively controlled according to the real-time working condition.

CN223531568U.title: Replacing mechanism for electric discharge machine
CN223531568U.abstract: The utility model discloses a replacement mechanism for an electric discharge machine, which relates to the field of electric discharge machines, and has the technical scheme that the replacement mechanism comprises an electric discharge machining head, a base and a horizontally arranged turntable, the turntable is rotationally connected to the top of the base through a motor, and a plurality of clamping components for clamping the electric discharge machining head are mounted on the turntable. When the electric spark machining head is damaged and needs to be disassembled, the damaged electric spark machining head is disassembled to one of the clamping assemblies and is clamped, and the motor is started to drive the rotating disc to rotate and drive the other clamping assemblies to rotate. The electric spark machining heads damaged in the using process can be detached to other unused clamping assemblies, so that the multiple clamping assemblies can clamp the multiple electric spark machining heads detached from the electric spark machine for multiple times, and an operator can detach and replace the electric spark machining heads on the multiple clamping assemblies in a centralized mode; and the treatment times and frequency after an operator disassembles the electric spark machining head are reduced.

CN120920828A.title: Arrangement method of electrode jig for arranging electrical discharge machining
CN120920828A.abstract: The invention discloses an arrangement method for arranging electrode jigs for electric discharge machining. The arrangement method comprises the following steps: respectively establishing electrode jig information according to electric discharge machining conditions of a plurality of electrode jigs; the electric discharge machining machine divides the multiple pieces of electrode jig information into a rough machining category, a finish machining category and a pouring gate machining category; next, the electric discharge machine not only arranges the above three categories into a rough machining category, a finish machining category and a pouring gate machining category in sequence, but also arranges information of a plurality of electrode jigs of each category from large to small according to the size of the area where the electrode jigs conduct electric discharge machining, and therefore the electric discharge machining accuracy is improved. According to the machining sequence arrangement method, the use sequence of the multiple electrode jigs can be correctly arranged, so that the use sequence of the multiple electrode jigs cannot be wrongly ranked due to practical experience of operators, and the selected electrode jigs can be used at opposite time points relative to an electric discharge machining machine.

CN223531567U.title: Electric discharge machine adjusting device
CN223531567U.abstract: The utility model discloses an electric discharge machine adjusting device, which relates to the field of electric discharge machines, and is characterized by comprising an electric discharge machining head, a storage tray, a working table and a mounting frame fixedly connected to the top of the working table. CN223531569U.abstract: The utility model discloses a waste liquid treatment device for an electric discharge machine, which relates to the field of electric discharge machines and is characterized by comprising a base, a storage tray and a collecting frame arranged on the base, and a push plate is slidably connected in the collecting frame along the horizontal direction. CN120901389A.title: Electrical discharge machine tool and machining method
CN120901389A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of numerical control machine tools, in particular to an electric discharge machining tool and a machining method. The stand column is fixed to the base; the X-axis moving platform is connected to the base and can move along the X axis relative to the base; the Y-axis moving platform is connected to the X-axis moving platform and can move along the Y axis relative to the X-axis moving platform, and the Y-axis moving platform is provided with a cutter and a workpiece station; the Z-axis moving assembly is connected to the stand column and can move along the Z axis relative to the stand column; the rotary electrode is connected to the lower end of the Z-axis moving assembly and can rotate around the Z axis relative to the Z-axis moving assembly; wherein during any two adjacent machining procedures, the Y-axis moving platform and the Z-axis moving assembly are actuated, and the rotary electrode rotates, so that the tool machines the rotary surface of the rotary electrode. Through the configuration, the rotary electrode is cut to ideal surface precision, and a feasible machining process is provided for machining an object which is difficult to mechanically cut.

CN223518817U.title: Guide mechanism of medium-speed wire cut electric discharge machine
CN223518817U.abstract: The utility model provides a guide mechanism of a medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge machine, which belongs to the technical field of medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge, and comprises a lower processing arm, a wire feeding mechanism, a guide wheel and a guide wheel cover, a mounting cavity for the guide wheel to rotate is formed between the guide wheel cover and the tail end of the lower processing arm, and the guide wheel is positioned below the wire feeding mechanism. A groove is formed in the side wall of the guide wheel in the circumferential direction of the guide wheel, the groove comprises a slag discharging groove part and a guide groove part which are arranged from inside to outside, the width of the slag discharging groove part is smaller than the diameter of a molybdenum wire, the width of the guide groove part is matched with the molybdenum wire, and the molybdenum wire is conveyed along the guide groove part; a guide wire channel communicated with the guide groove part is arranged on the upper end surface of the guide groove part towards the guide groove part; according to the molybdenum wire conveying device, the rotatable guide wheel is adopted to replace a traditional wire guide pipe, during continuous rotation of the guide wheel, the molybdenum wire conveying efficiency can be improved, deslagging is facilitated, the molybdenum wire can be well protected, and the service life of the molybdenum wire can be prolonged.

JP2025160333A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE MACHINE AND ELECTRIC DISCHARGE METHOD
JP2025160333A.abstract: To provide a wire electric discharge machine that can extend a service life of a filter 32, even when subjecting an aluminum-based material to electric discharge machining.SOLUTION: A wire electric discharge machine (10) according to an embodiment in the disclosure subjects an aluminum-based material to electric discharge machining. A processing liquid used for electric discharge machining in the wire electric discharge machine includes one or more cations selected from potassium ions, calcium ions, sodium ions, and magnesium ions, and one or more anions selected from sulfate ions, sulfite ions, disulfite ions, hydrogen sulfite ions, hydroxide ions, nitrate ions, and nitrite ions.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

WO2025220661A1.title: PROCÉDÉ D'ÉVALUATION DE LA RÉSISTANCE À LA CORROSION ÉLECTROLYTIQUE DE PALIER À ROULEMENT
WO2025220661A1.abstract: The method of the present invention employs: a testing step S1 in which a prescribed voltage is applied to a rolling bearing in a state in which the inner ring and the outer ring are rotating relative to one another; an investigation step S2 in which a search is conducted, within a first rolling surface and a second rolling surface that have completed the testing step, for an abnormal surface portion generated when a single electric discharge occurs between the first rolling surface or the second rolling surface and the rolling body; and an evaluation step S4 in which, if an abnormal surface portion comprising an electric discharge mark generated with an uneven shape is found in the investigation step, it is determined that the rolling bearing may generate ridge marks due to electrolytic corrosion on the first rolling surface or the second rolling surface, and if no electric discharge mark is found in the investigation step, it is determined that the rolling bearing does not generate ridge marks.

JP2025164642A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE MACHINE AND METHOD OF THE SAME
JP2025164642A.abstract: To provide an electric discharge machine and a method of the same.SOLUTION: An electric discharge machine and a method of the same perform a discharge processing procedure on an object to be machined. The electric discharge machine includes a mounting base, and an electric discharge unit. The mounting base mounts the object to be machined. The object to be machined has a machining target area. The electric discharge unit performs an electric discharge procedure on the machining target area of the object to be machined, by a machining parameter, through a discharge electrode. The electric discharge unit adjusts an actual output energy value according to a state of change of a discharge frequency or discharge energy during the process of discharge of the discharge processing procedure, and thereby can maintain the discharge processing procedure in a target processing state. The electric discharge machine and the method assists in removing a residue remaining in a working groove by external force to be provided, by using a slag discharge unit, while an insulating sleeve covers the discharge electrode, which can reduce Kerf loss.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

CN120802604A.title: Simulation control system for discharge processing in high-radiation boron-containing water environment of nuclear power plant
CN120802604A.abstract: The invention particularly relates to a discharge machining simulation control system for a nuclear power plant in a high-radiation boron-containing water environment, which belongs to the technical field of special maintenance in the high-radiation environment of the nuclear power plant and comprises a man-machine interaction system, a discharge machining control system and subsystems. Each subsystem comprises a pulse power supply system, a servo power system, a washing system, a purification system, a grounding system and a tool system; the man-machine interaction system is used for man-machine interaction and displaying the discharge machining implementation data fed back by the subsystems; the electric discharge machining control system is used for generating an electric discharge machining instruction according to the man-machine interaction information and controlling the subsystems to cooperate to perform electric discharge machining work; and each subsystem is used for implementing electric discharge machining work according to the electric discharge machining instruction and feeding back electric discharge machining implementation data. According to the invention, simulation control of discharge processing in the high-radiation boron-containing water environment of the nuclear power plant is realized.

WO2025220317A1.title: PROCÉDÉ DE FABRICATION D'UNE ROUE À AUBES FERMÉE
WO2025220317A1.abstract: In a closed impeller (1) made of an aluminum alloy, a plurality of blades (3) arranged in the circumferential direction connect a hub (2) and a shroud (4). First, electric discharge machining is performed on impeller material to form a plurality of flow passages (5) between the blades (3). Then, a surface of a flow passage that is the inner peripheral surface of each flow passage (5) in the impeller material is polished to remove a modified layer formed on the surface of the flow passage by the electric discharge machining, and then the surface of the flow passage is further polished.

CN120828172A.title: Electrical discharge machining apparatus and method
CN120828172A.abstract: The invention relates to an electric discharge machining device and method which are used for performing an electric discharge machining program on a to-be-machined object. The electrical discharge machining apparatus includes a stage and an electrical discharge machining unit. The carrying table is used for carrying a to-be-machined object. The to-be-processed object defines a processing target area. The electrical discharge machining unit performs an electrical discharge machining procedure on a machining target area of the to-be-machined object through the discharge electrode according to the machining parameters. The electric discharge machining unit correspondingly adjusts the actual output energy value according to the change state of the discharge frequency or the discharge energy in the discharge process of the electric discharge machining program, so that the electric discharge machining program is maintained in the target machining state. According to the electric discharge machining device and method, a deslagging unit is used for providing external force to assist in removing residues remaining in a machining groove. In addition, the insulation sleeve is used for wrapping the discharge electrode, so that cut loss can be reduced.

CN223465668U.title: Machine tool structure with symmetrical combined machine heads
CN223465668U.abstract: The utility model discloses a machine tool structure with symmetrical combined machine heads. The machine tool structure comprises a base, a first stand column, a second stand column, a first set of electric discharge machining machine heads and a second set of electric discharge machining machine heads. A working groove is formed in the base, the first stand column is arranged on one side of the base, and the second stand column is arranged on the other side of the base. A first X-axis linear module is arranged on the first stand column, and a second X-axis linear module is arranged on the second stand column. The first group of electric discharge machining machine heads is connected with the first X-axis linear module, and the second group of electric discharge machining machine heads is connected with the second X-axis linear module; each of the first group of electric discharge machining machine heads and the second group of electric discharge machining machine heads comprises at least three machine heads; any one of the discharge machining machine heads is provided with an independent Y-axis linear module and an independent Z-axis linear module and is connected with a discharge machining power source. The linkage of the first group and the second group of discharge machining machine heads can machine a plurality of workpieces or machine different parts of the same workpiece at the same time, so that the parallel work is realized, and the efficiency is improved.

CN223455210U.title: Four-head bilateral spark machine
CN223455210U.abstract: The utility model relates to a four-head double-side electric discharge machine, and belongs to the technical field of electric discharge machines. The device comprises a working table, bases higher than the table top of the working table are arranged on the two sides of the working table, the bases are symmetrically arranged on the two sides of the working table, two sets of spark units are slidably connected to the two sets of bases correspondingly, the four sets of spark units form a four-head structure, and the structures on the two sides of the working table are symmetrical; according to the design of the four-head double-side spark machine in the scheme, the spark units are arranged on the two sides of the workbench, two sets of spark units are arranged on each side, and the total number of the four sets of spark units is four. By means of the design, non-standard point position synchronous electric spark machining of the workpiece is achieved, the machining efficiency is greatly improved, and the device is particularly suitable for processing of non-standard customized products and has the efficient synchronous machining capacity. The spark machine head can freely move on the workbench in a three-dimensional mode and has the precise displacement control capacity. The flexibility ensures that the spark machine head can accurately reach any designated position on the workbench, and the complex machining requirement is met.

CN120801496A.title: Detection device for data cable processing
CN120801496A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of wire and cable manufacturing and detection, and discloses a detection device for data cable processing, which comprises an electric discharge machine device, dust collection stabilizing devices are fixedly connected to two sides of the electric discharge machine device, and tension guide wheel devices are fixedly connected to the bottoms of the dust collection stabilizing devices. The spark machine device is fixedly connected with the integral shell, the spark machine device is fixedly connected with the base, the base is fixedly connected with the integral shell, and the tension guide wheel device is arranged, so that the detection precision is ensured, the missing detection and false alarm rate is reduced, the equipment compatibility is improved, the equipment loss is reduced, and the service life of the equipment is prolonged; the dust collection device is arranged, dust on the cable is cleaned and collected through negative pressure, the influence on subsequent procedures is reduced, the production stability is improved, the shutdown risk is reduced, the stabilizing assembly is arranged, high-speed shaking is restrained through non-contact adsorption of the negative pressure, and the procedure precision is improved.
