CN120824052A.title: Control rod driving mechanism heat insulation sleeve dismounting process
CN120824052A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of special maintenance of reactor bodies, and particularly relates to a control rod driving mechanism thermal sleeve dismantling process. Comprising the following steps that 1, a dismantling robot walks and is positioned to the position under a to-be-dismantled heat casing pipe; 2, the electric spark machining head is jacked and positioned to the position of the upper end of the to-be-dismantled hot casing pipe; 3, the electric spark machining head conducts electric discharge machining on the upper end of the to-be-dismantled hot sleeve till the upper end is completely cut off; 4, the heat sleeve is moved downwards, and middle cutting is carried out; and 5, the hot sleeve is taken out. The method provided by the invention has the beneficial effects that the method of removing the hot sleeve from the lower part of the top cover is adopted, so that the welding seam of the pressure-resistant shell of the control rod driving mechanism is prevented from being damaged, and the test verification work after the primary loop pressure boundary is damaged is not needed. And an electric spark machining method is adopted, remote automatic machining in a narrow space can be achieved, the reaction of machining does not exist, and the equipment can be light and miniaturized.

CN120772612A.title: EDM cutting device with rotary positioning function
CN120772612A.abstract: The invention belongs to the field of remote underwater maintenance, and particularly relates to an EDM cutting device with a rotary positioning function, which comprises a base, a positioning mechanism, a driving mechanism and an electrode device, the positioning mechanism is mounted on the base, the driving mechanism is mounted on the positioning mechanism, and the electrode device is mounted on the driving mechanism; the positioning mechanism is used for adjusting the electrode device in the circumferential direction, and the driving mechanism is used for vertically moving the electrode device in the axial direction; the electrode device is used for conducting electric discharge machining on the machined part. According to the device, center positioning is conducted through the positioning shaft and the positioning groove of the positioning mechanism, and accurate positioning of the EDM electrode and the machining position is achieved; and circumferential positioning is carried out through the rotating part of the driving mechanism, so that positioning of the EDM electrode in the circumferential direction is realized.

CN223418524U.title: Tensioning wire discharging device of medium-speed wire cut electric discharge machine
CN223418524U.abstract: The utility model provides a tensioning wire outlet device of a medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge machine, and belongs to the technical field of medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge machine.The tensioning wire outlet device comprises a base, a sliding seat and a charging barrel, the charging barrel is used for outputting molybdenum wires wound on the charging barrel through rotation and is arranged on the sliding seat, and a sliding mechanism is arranged between the sliding seat and the base; the sliding mechanism comprises a driving assembly, and a guide rail and a sliding block which are arranged between the first inclined surface and the second inclined surface; compared with a traditional medium-speed wire cut electric discharge machine which adopts a tension adjusting mechanism with a plurality of tensioning wheels, the wire outlet device with the tensioning function has the advantages that the number of the tensioning wheels can be reduced, the structure of the device and the steps of threading and winding molybdenum wires are simplified, and the production efficiency is improved. US2025316471A1.title: ULTRAVIOLET LIGHT EMITTING ELEMENT AND ULTRAVIOLET LIGHT IRRADIATION DEVICE PROVIDED WITH THE SAME
US2025316471A1.abstract: The present invention provides a safe ultraviolet light irradiation device that uses ultraviolet light safe to the human body and has a wide range of microorganism elimination and sterilization effects, and also provides an ultraviolet light emitting element provided with: an electrode substrate having a pair of electrodes; at least one cylindrical or flattened cylindrical glass tube disposed on the electrode substrate so as to face both of the electrodes, the glass tube having both end parts sealed; a xenon gas-containing discharge gas enclosed inside the glass tube and generating an electric discharge due to a voltage applied to the electrodes; and a phosphor layer formed on an inner surface of the glass tube and emitting light when excited by the electric discharge, wherein the glass tube is made of borosilicate glass or quartz glass; and the phosphor layer is made of a phosphate-based fluorescent material and has an emission spectrum having a peak half value width within a wavelength range of 50 nm or less with a peak at a wavelength of 203±10 inm on an illuminance basis.

JP2025142940A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE PROCESSING METHOD
JP2025142940A.abstract: To provide an electric discharge processing method with which it is possible to efficiently reproduce the battery subject to processing.SOLUTION: The electric discharge processing method comprises: a discharge step in which a depleted lithium-ion secondary battery is discharged, and lithium is moved from the anode to the cathode of the lithium-ion secondary battery; a charge step in which the lithium-ion secondary battery is charged with a low voltage at which the proportion of lithium returning to the anode is small; a measurement step in which the capacity of the lithium-ion secondary battery is measured after being charged with the low voltage for a prescribed duration; and a confirmation step in which the state of health (SOH) is confirmed on the basis of the measured capacity of the lithium-ion secondary battery. US2025309630A1.title: ELECTRIC CHARGE SHIELDING DEVICE
US2025309630A1.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a shielding device against atmospheric discharges. The device comprises a first conductive element and a second conductive element that passes through the first conductive element, wherein both conductive elements are electrically insulated by means of a first insulating body, and a second insulating body that are connected to the ends of the first conductive element and the second conductive element. Additionally, the device comprises a third conductive element that passes through the second conductive element that is connected to a fourth conductive element. The fourth conductive element is connected to one of the ends of the first and second conductive elements, and the shape of the fourth conductive element prevents the generation of a corona effect in the presence of an electric discharge. In addition, the third conductive element allows the lightning shielding device to be connected to a grounding element, thus concentrating the electric discharge only in the lightning shielding device, acting as an electric capacitor, and producing the flow of electric charge towards the grounding element, preventing the discharge from spreading to structures or people around.

UA160614U.title: METHOD OF GENERATING A PRESET PRESSURE WAVE BY A HIGH-VOLTAGE ELECTROCHEMICAL EXPLOSION TO PROVIDE THE REQUIRED FORCE EFFECT ON THE PROCESSED OBJECT
UA160614U.abstract: Method of generating a preset pressure wave by a high-voltage electrochemical explosion to provide the required force effect on the processed object, in which the required total energy of the high-voltage electrochemical explosion is determined, which consists of electrical and chemical energies, an empirical dependence is obtained for an exothermic mixture containing 60% aluminum powder in an aqueous solution of an oxidant, at variable values ​​of the electrical energy and mass of the exothermic mixture, by which the specific electrical energy and the specific combustion efficiency of the exothermic mixture are determined, as the coordinates of the point of contact of the tangent line to the empirical dependence, at which the maximum chemical energy is released at a certain value of the total energy, and the mass of the exothermic mixture is determined. Capsule is filled with exothermic mixture, into which electrodes are installed from opposite sides, and the exothermic mixture is ignited by a discharge current when high-voltage pulses are applied to the electrodes from a pulse current generator with a capacitance. Before determining the required total energy of a high-voltage electrochemical explosion, a preset pressure wave is obtained at a certain point in the wave zone of the technological volume for the required force effect on the processed object, according to which the calculated parameters of the pulse current generator are determined. Required total energy of the electrochemical explosion is determined through the energy of a high-voltage electric discharge in the liquid. After determining the mass of the exothermic mixture, the amount of chemical energy released due to exothermic reactions and the amount of electrical energy are determined based on the calculated total energy. The required capacitance C of the pulse current generator is calculated, which is then installed in the pulse current generator, from which high voltage pulses are supplied to the electrodes installed in the capsule with the exothermic mixture.

CN120599010A.title: Discharge detection method and system for adaptive registration of ultraviolet and visible light images
CN120599010A.abstract: The invention discloses a discharge detection method and system for adaptive registration of ultraviolet and visible light images, and belongs to the technical field of image processing. An ultraviolet image and a visible light image of a discharge area of power equipment are respectively captured through an imaging module; motion vectors of a visible light image sequence are calculated according to optical flow motion estimation in a motion scene through a registration module and mapped to an ultraviolet image for displacement compensation, translation compensation is determined by adopting histogram matching in a static scene, and the motion vectors of the visible light image sequence are calculated according to the compensated image. Zooming the ultraviolet image according to the zoom scale calculated by the focal length and the central point of the ultraviolet image, and zooming the effective registration area of the cut ultraviolet image to a target size; and the electric detection module carries out electric discharge detection on the discharge point area according to the registered image. According to the method, the robustness is improved, boundary offset and nonlinear distortion are avoided, edge linear fitting is realized while accurate alignment of the center points is ensured, and the calculation efficiency is remarkably improved in cooperation with integer operation.

CN223308355U.abstract: The utility model provides a detection circuit of a discharge lamp and printing equipment, and belongs to the technical field of printing equipment. US2025266255A1.title: Ion Source
US2025266255A1.abstract: In an ion source 100 configured to generate ions by a process involving an electric discharge, at least the surface of at least an anode 121 of discharging electrodes included in the ion source is made of titanium in order to prevent a decrease in the power output of the ion source due to the formation of an oxide film on an electrode surface. Titanium has the nature that it forms a film on its surface through oxidization and yet does not lose its electric conductivity even when oxidized. Therefore, the power output of this ion source will not decrease even when an oxide film is formed on the surface of the anode, so that it can be used for a long period of time without requiring the electrode polishing or similar tasks.

CN120467897A.abstract: The invention discloses a method for testing the mechanical property of a WC-316L composite material, which comprises the following steps: S1, depositing each WC-316L composite material by using laser melting deposition equipment, and respectively preparing multiple layers of deposition samples with the same size; s2, performing cutting sample preparation on each prepared multi-layer deposition sample by using a wire cut electric discharge machine; s3, under the condition of room temperature, a universal testing machine is used for carrying out tensile testing on each prepared multilayer deposition sample, and in the testing process, the displacement of the cross beam and the corresponding load stress after the universal testing machine is subjected to load tensile are recorded; and S4, according to the recorded data, calculating to obtain a stress-strain curve corresponding to each multilayer deposition sample. JP2025112753A.title: SILICON CARBIDE INGOT MANUFACTURING METHOD, AND SILICON CARBIDE SUBSTRATE MANUFACTURING METHOD
JP2025112753A.abstract: To provide a silicon carbide ingot manufacturing method capable of restraining cracks on a silicon carbide ingot.SOLUTION: A silicon carbide ingot manufacturing method includes the following steps. A silicon carbide single crystal having a poly-type of 4H is prepared. The silicon carbide single crystal has a first end face, a second end face, and an outer peripheral face. The second end face is opposite to the first end face. The outer peripheral face is communicated with the first and second end faces. The silicon carbide single crystal is ground on at least one of the first and second end faces. The silicon carbide single crystal is ground on the outer peripheral face. After the step of grinding the silicon carbide single crystal on at least one of the first and second end faces and the step of grinding the silicon carbide single crystal on the outer peripheral face, a notch part is formed on the silicon carbide single crystal using electric discharge wire processing.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 6

NZ798142A.title: Co shift unit for the conversion of solid waste into syngas
NZ798142A.abstract: According to the invention, solid recovered fuel pellets are torrefied to charred pellets, producing torrefaction gas that is converted into a torrefaction syngas containing hydrogen and carbon monoxide. A syngas stream comprising the torrefaction syngas is supplied to a CO shift unit, where carbon monoxide reacts with water steam to carbon dioxide and hydrogen, generating shifted syngas. The invention provides that the shifted syngas is passed through a low temperature heat recovery unit, where its heat energy is transferred to at least two process water streams that are used as process water during the production of the product gas stream. By utilizing this heat, waste heat losses are reduced, and the overall energy efficiency of the process is improved. Further, an increased hydrogen content of the product gas is achieved.

WO2025259552A2.title: TRAITEMENT DE CHARGES D'ALIMENTATION MONOCOTYLÉDONES POUR DÉPULPAGE
WO2025259552A2.abstract: Feedstock including an amphiphilic lignocellulosic biomass can be processed using enzymes prior to pulping. The enzymes break down the biomass by disrupting the surface or cell walls or by reducing wax or other components. Such enzymes include cellulases, hemicellulases, laccases, peroxidases, and pectinases. Suitable enzymes can be obtained from secretions of microbes in soil organic matter from soil in which the feedstock was grown. If the pulping process includes steam explosion, such enzy matic processing of a biomass prior to steam explosion will increase absorption of water by the processed feedstock. In steam explosion, due to the increased ability of the processed feedstock to absorb water, steam explosion is more effective in breaking apart the processed feedstock. For other pulping processes, such enzymatic treatments break down the biomass, enabling extraction of the desired components from the processed feedstock through subsequent processing using less energy and fewer chemicals.

CN121112792A.title: High-temperature fused salt energy storage and heat release system for absorbing new energy and application method
CN121112792A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-temperature fused salt energy storage and heat release system for absorbing new energy and an application method, and the method comprises the steps: pumping 290 DEG C low-temperature fused salt into a low-pressure and/or high-pressure fused salt electric heater through a cold salt pump for heating to obtain 560 DEG C high-temperature fused salt, and enabling the 560 DEG C high-temperature fused salt to enter a hot salt tank; the demineralized water is heated to 80 DEG C through a low-pressure feed water heater and enters a deaerator; the demineralized water is continuously heated to 160 DEG C through a deaerator, and the demineralized water is pumped into a high-pressure feed water heater; the demineralized water is heated to 255 DEG C to become demineralized water steam, and the demineralized water steam enters a steam generator; carrying out a heat exchange process of the demineralized water steam and the high-temperature molten salt to generate superheated steam at 350 DEG C; and high-temperature fused salt at 560 DEG C is pumped into the steam generator from the hot salt tank through the hot salt pump to exchange heat with desalted water steam, is cooled to 290 DEG C and returns to the cold salt tank. By means of the advantage that high-pressure steam is supplied through fused salt energy storage, industrial characteristics and advantages are met, and reference and leading effects are achieved on demonstration application of the energy storage and new energy industry.

CN120951406A.title: Black liquor combustion alkali furnace optimization design method based on numerical simulation
CN120951406A.abstract: The invention discloses a black liquor combustion alkali furnace optimization design method based on numerical simulation, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the geometric modeling of an alkali furnace in a design stage, combining the combustion of the alkali furnace, NOx generation and a flue gas-water/steam heat exchange model, and obtaining the distribution rules of a temperature field, a velocity field and a concentration field in the alkali furnace and the heat efficiency of the alkali furnace through CFD numerical simulation. Therefore, the rationality of the current design can be evaluated, an optimized alkali furnace design scheme can be obtained through iterative optimization, and the later operation and maintenance cost is reduced. In addition to the optimization design stage, the technical method can be adopted for the existing alkali furnace to carry out fault diagnosis and technical transformation scheme effectiveness evaluation.

CN223550435U.title: Large-temperature-difference high-temperature fused salt and water heat exchange steam generation system
CN223550435U.abstract: The utility model discloses a large-temperature-difference high-temperature fused salt and water heat exchange steam production system. The system comprises a fused salt storage tank, a high-pressure hot water storage tank, a fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger and a steam pocket, the fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger is of a multi-shell-pass spiral coil pipe type heat exchanger structure. A plurality of limiting inner barrels are arranged in a shell barrel to form annular cavities of different levels, a plurality of heat transfer pipes are connected in parallel and wound around a central pipe or the wall of an upper-level fiber inner barrel to form spiral coil pipes, and a plurality of sets of spiral coil pipes are arranged in the annular cavities respectively. A shell side fused salt liquid inlet, a shell side fused salt liquid outlet, a pipe side water inlet and a pipe side steam outlet are formed in the shell cylinder body; the fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger is connected with an outlet and an inlet of the fused salt storage tank and further connected with a water outlet and an inlet of the high-pressure hot water storage tank. High-temperature thermal shock damage of the heat exchanger and pipeline blockage caused by fused salt solidification can be effectively eliminated, membrane boiling of water is inhibited, the heat transfer efficiency is high, and system operation is safe and reliable.

CN120970315A.title: Zero-power-consumption thermal power cold end system vacuum optimization device
CN120970315A.abstract: The invention discloses a zero-power-consumption thermal power cold end system vacuum optimization device, which belongs to the technical field of vacuum optimization, and comprises a front vacuum absorber, an annular water-gas self-oscillation processing mechanism, a gas-gas-liquid self-separation device and a gas-liquid isolation secondary separation device which are sequentially connected in series, and the output end is connected with a condenser hot well through a gas-liquid isolation secondary separation device. The chemical replenishment water is dynamically mixed with the steam-steam mixture at the outlet of the condenser through jet entrainment, so that water steam is condensed, after the formed steam-steam mixture is separated, non-condensable gas is extracted by vacuumizing equipment, and liquid is recycled to a hot well. The device does not need extra energy consumption, the vacuum degree of the condenser is effectively improved through multi-stage mixing, separation and recovery closed loops, and coal consumption and operation cost are reduced.

AU2025242167A1.title: Espresso machine with cold brew mode
AU2025242167A1.abstract: Abstract An espresso machine for producing an espresso coffee beverage from coffee grounds held by a portafilter, the espresso machine including: a water tank; a group head for receiving the portafilter; CN120906524A.title: Mixed gas generating device for heavy oil thermal recovery high-pressure gas injection
CN120906524A.abstract: The invention provides a heavy oil thermal recovery high-pressure gas injection mixed gas generation device which comprises a gas mixing generation unit, the mixed gas generation unit is connected to the top of a supporting base, and the mixed gas generation unit is used for manufacturing high-pressure mixed gas; the gas mixing generation unit comprises a gas generation shell, a combustion assembly, a dispersion assembly and a temperature adjusting assembly are arranged in an inner cavity of the gas generation shell, one end of the combustion assembly is fixedly connected with one side of the gas generation shell in a penetrating mode, the other end of the combustion assembly is rotationally connected with one end of the dispersion assembly, and the temperature adjusting assembly is arranged on the outer side of the dispersion assembly. Combustion gas generated by the combustion assembly can be evenly dispersed in the gas generation shell through the dispersion assembly, water can be fully sprayed to an inner cavity of the gas generation shell through the temperature adjusting assembly, the combustion gas can make full contact with the water, steam is generated, and therefore mixed gas can be obtained; and the mixed gas is pressurized and injected into an oil well through the gas storage module, the steam injection module and the like, and heavy oil thermal recovery is carried out.

CN223516143U.title: Built-in sealed water tank assembly for pipeline machine
CN223516143U.abstract: The utility model discloses a built-in sealed water tank component for a pipeline machine in the field of drinking water equipment, which comprises a water tank and a water pump, an opening is arranged at the top of the water tank, a water tank cover is arranged at the opening, a water inlet and an air vent which are communicated with the water tank are arranged on the water tank cover, and the air vent is connected with a water-steam separation box through an air pipe. A water outlet is formed in the bottom of the water tank, a three-way pipe is arranged at the water outlet, and the other two connectors of the three-way pipe are connected with the drainage pipe and a water inlet pipe of the water pump respectively. The water inlet and the air vent in the water tank cover are utilized to ensure that water from the water purifier can enter the water tank, and water in the water tank cannot flow into the pipeline machine, so that damage to components caused by water leakage is avoided; the drainage pipe and the water inlet pipe of the water pump are connected with the water outlet at the bottom of the water tank through the three-way pipe, so that water in the water tank can be fully sucked by the water pump, stored water is reduced, and the stored water in the water tank can be drained conveniently when the pipeline machine is not used for a long time.

CN223518454U.title: Plate forming equipment
CN223518454U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of galvanized sheet processing, in particular to sheet forming equipment, which comprises an upper die, a lower die and a water bath system, the upper die comprises an upper die holder and an upper die insert arranged on the upper die holder, and the lower die comprises a lower die holder and a lower die insert arranged on the lower die holder; the water bath system comprises a water tank arranged on the lower die holder and a steam collecting device arranged on the upper die holder; when the upper die and the lower die are closed, the forming surfaces of the upper die insert and the lower die insert are positioned in the water tank; and the steam collecting device is used for discharging water steam formed above the water tank to the outside of the equipment. According to the plate forming equipment, a large amount of water vapor can be discharged through the steam collecting device, the damp condition of a machine tool of the equipment is reduced, the problems that the equipment is affected with damp and corroded due to the water vapor can be solved, and then the probability that the equipment breaks down can be reduced.

CN223482854U.abstract: The utility model provides an air compressor with double separation and double cooling systems. CN223504050U.abstract: The utility model discloses a water dispenser water outlet nozzle capable of stopping water stably, which comprises a water outlet nozzle body provided with an inner cavity and provided with a water outlet and a water inlet; the partition plate component comprises a first partition plate, a second partition plate and a third partition plate, the first partition plate divides the inner cavity into a first cavity and a second cavity, the water outlet and the water inlet are both communicated with the first cavity, an air outlet is formed in the second cavity and located at the bottom of the water outlet nozzle body, and the second partition plate is located at one end of the water inlet; the third partition plate is located on the side, away from the second partition plate, of the second partition plate, the water outlet is located between the first partition plate and the second partition plate, and a gap is reserved between the first partition plate and the second partition plate. WO2025217468A1.abstract: A multiphase pellet comprises a calcium-based material in combination with an aluminum-containing binder or a silicon-containing binder, or both. The multiphase pellet can undergo more than about 300 standard cycles of charging and discharging. CN223416176U.abstract: The utility model discloses a spray type dish-washing machine with an elbow nozzle. Tap water enters the stainless steel inner container through the water inlet electromagnetic valve. CN120745189A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of geological disaster prediction, and discloses a high-speed remote landslide dynamic process prediction method, which comprises the following steps: S1, selecting a landslide research area, and obtaining physical and mechanical parameters of solid-phase particles, ice, water, gas, a solid skeleton and a sliding mass of the landslide area; s2, according to the physical and mechanical parameters, establishing a mechanical equilibrium equation, a material conservation equation and an energy conservation equation, and establishing a high-speed remote landslide heat-water-force-steam coupling kinetic model for describing the whole process of ice-water-steam phase change in the cold region; and S3, performing simulation prediction on the dynamic process of the high-speed long-distance landslide through the thermal-water-force-steam coupling dynamic model of the high-speed long-distance landslide to obtain a prediction result. ZA202409990B.title: SURFACE INTEGRATION OF HYDROGEN GENERATION, STORAGE, AND INTEGRATION AND UTILIZATION OF WASTE HEAT FROM ENHANCED GEOLOGIC HYDROGEN PRODUCTION AND DECARBONATION REACTIONS
ZA202409990B.abstract: A method of producing hydrogen and sequestering carbon or sulfur includes generating a fluid including at least one of water, steam, hydrogen sulfide, carbon dioxide and heat as a byproduct of a surface facility and injecting the fluid into a subsurface formation. The subsurface formation can include a porous rock, in various forms of porosity such as intragranular, intergranular, fracture porosity. The method can further include heating the fluid to stimulate an exothermic reaction of the fluid with components of the subsurface rock formation and produce a hydrogen reaction product and one or more of sulfur minerals from the hydrogen sulfide or carbon minerals from the carbon dioxide. The fluid can be heated to between about 25°C and about 500°C. The method can also include extracting the hydrogen produced from the reaction of the fluid with the subsurface rock formation and mineralizing at least one of the sulfur or carbon in the porous rock.

CN223329075U.abstract: The utility model relates to a device for adjusting steam by using an ejector, which comprises the ejector, a Rafael nozzle, an expansion pipe, a first input pipeline, a second input pipeline, an output pipeline, a demineralized water component, a pressure adjusting component and a temperature adjusting component, the Rafael nozzle is arranged in the ejector, the expansion pipe is arranged on the ejector, and the first input pipeline and the second input pipeline are communicated with the output pipeline. The first input pipeline is arranged at the end, away from the expansion pipe, of the ejector, the second input pipeline is arranged at the end, close to the expansion pipe, of the ejector, the output pipeline is arranged at the output end of the expansion pipe, the demineralized water assembly is arranged on the expansion pipe, and the pressure adjusting assembly is arranged on the ejector. And the temperature adjusting assembly is arranged on the demineralized water assembly. According to the device, the energy of high-pressure steam pressure reduction is fully utilized, so that the consumption of steam in a water steam stripping method and the energy consumption in a temperature and pressure reduction process are reduced.

CN120586111A.title: Intelligent temperature control instantaneous sterilization and rapid cooling equipment
CN120586111A.abstract: The invention provides intelligent temperature control instantaneous sterilization and rapid cooling equipment. The intelligent temperature control instantaneous sterilization and rapid cooling equipment comprises a bottom plate, a shell is arranged at the upper end of the bottom plate, a water drainage pipe is arranged on one side of the shell, a water steam drainage hole is formed in the upper end of the shell, an inner container is arranged in the shell, and the outer surface of the inner container is in threaded connection with a pressurization top cover; an electric telescopic rod is fixedly connected to the top inner wall of the pressurizing top cover, a pressing plate is fixedly connected to the lower end of the electric telescopic rod, a second water inlet pipe is fixedly connected to the inner wall of the shell, a cooling-water machine is fixedly connected to the upper end of the bottom plate, and a water pump is installed in a water tank of the cooling-water machine; the outer surface of the inner container is fixedly connected with a heating resistance ring, a sealing heat insulation sleeve is arranged outside the inner container, and through the structure, efficient sterilization can be achieved, cooling can be conducted in time, the humidity in the inner container can be reduced in time, and adverse effects of the high-humidity environment on the inner container and objects in the inner container are prevented.

US2025276903A1.title: A zero emission process for producing syngas
US2025276903A1.abstract: Process for producing syngas comprising the steps of:a) burning methane or natural gas with oxygen and optionally with water steam for producing flue gas comprising CO2 and H2O according to the following reaction:C⁢H4+2⁢O2→CO2+2⁢H2⁢O[1]b) cooling the flue gas coming from a) by heat exchange with a water stream which is thereby vapourised;c) condensing and removing water from the flue gas, coming from step b), thereby obtaining a mixture consisting essentially of CO2;d) carrying out an electrolysis of a steam stream in a solid oxide electrolytic cell (SOEC), whereby steam is split into oxygen gas and hydrogen gas according to the following reaction scheme:H2O(g)→H2+1/2⁢O2[2]e) separating and drying hydrogen gasf) carrying out a reverse water gas shift reaction between CO2 coming from step c) with H2 coming from step e) according to the following scheme:CO2+H2→CO+H2O.[3]

CN223283054U.title: Hot water and steam multipurpose electric heating furnace
CN223283054U.abstract: The utility model discloses a hot water steam multipurpose electric heating furnace which comprises an electric heater and a furnace body, and further comprises a cold water collecting pipe, a hot water collecting pipe and at least one coil pipe, water and cold water are stored in an inner cavity of the furnace body, the hot water collecting pipe is in a barrel shape and located above the cold water collecting pipe, a pipe body of the cold water collecting pipe is arranged in the inner cavity of the furnace body, and the coil pipe is arranged in the inner cavity of the furnace body. A cold water inlet end of the cold water collecting pipe is arranged on the outer side of the furnace body, a pipe body of the hot water collecting pipe is arranged in an inner cavity of the furnace body, a hot water outlet end of the hot water collecting pipe is arranged on the outer side of the furnace body, the coil pipe is vertically arranged in the inner cavity of the furnace body in a spiral shape, and a pipe opening in the lower end of the coil pipe is communicated with an inner cavity of the cold water collecting pipe. A pipe opening in the upper end of the coil pipe is communicated with an inner cavity of the hot water collecting pipe, the boiler body is vertically arranged, and a steam outlet is formed in the top end of the boiler body. The multi-heat-source heat supply system can provide hot water media and steam media, the two heat supply media are independent of each other, and the multi-heat-source heat supply requirement of a user is met.

CN223283057U.title: Upper boiler barrel of boiler
CN223283057U.abstract: The upper boiler barrel comprises a barrel body, a front sealing head and a rear sealing head, an underwater pore plate parallel to an axis is arranged in the barrel body along the lower position of the axis, the left side and the right side of the underwater pore plate are respectively connected with a baffle which inclines upwards, the upper ends of the baffles are fixedly connected with the inner wall of the barrel body, and the lower ends of the baffles are fixedly connected with the lower end of the barrel body. Through holes are formed in positions, corresponding to the left and right baffles, of the barrel and are connected with the ascending pipe; a sealing plate is arranged at the front ends of the underwater pore plate and the two baffles, the lower edge of the sealing plate is lower than the underwater pore plate, a pore plate parallel to the underwater pore plate is arranged between the lower edge of the sealing plate and the front sealing head, and a through hole is formed in the position, corresponding to the pore plate, of the cylinder body and connected with a downcomer. According to the technical scheme, it can be ensured that a water-steam mixture entering from the ascending pipe can only flow into the lower half part of the cavity of the barrel firstly, then steam penetrates through the underwater pore plate and enters the upper half part of the cavity of the barrel upwards, first-time steam-water separation is achieved, and the water inlet of the descending pipe can be prevented from forming vortexes.

CN120557922A.title: Drying, sterilizing and heating cabinet for medicine bags
CN120557922A.abstract: The medicine bag drying, sterilizing and heating cabinet comprises a water storage tank and a heating part, and the water storage tank is provided with a steam channel and a water return channel; a plurality of disinfection boxes are sequentially arranged above the water storage tank, and each disinfection box is provided with an air inlet channel and an air outlet channel; a water-vapor separation part and a condensation box are arranged between the water storage tank and the disinfection box; the water-steam separation part is communicated between the steam channel and the air inlet channel; the water-vapor separation part is provided with a drainage channel which is communicated with the water return channel; the condensing box communicates with the air outlet channel and the water return channel; the condensation boxes are arranged on one sides of the corresponding disinfection boxes and are sequentially stacked above the water storage box, and the upper condensation box is communicated with the lower condensation box through a drainage pipe. The water storage tank is heated through the heating part to produce high-temperature and high-humidity steam, water in the steam is separated through the water-steam separation part, the high-temperature and low-humidity steam is obtained to dry and heat a medicine bag, the water is recycled to the water storage tank through the condensation box, and the medicine bag drying and heating device has the advantages of being small in consumption and high in safety.

CN223263661U.title: Membrane filtration structure
CN223263661U.abstract: The utility model provides a membrane filtration structure, and aims to solve the technical problems that the existing primary saline water membrane filtration is open, the quality of saline water is easily influenced by external impurities, and the cost is high by adopting pure water liquid seal. The structure comprises a filtering main body, the filtering main body is internally provided with a membrane assembly, the membrane assembly divides the filtering main body into a clear liquid cavity and a dirty liquid cavity, and the top of the clear liquid cavity is open; the dustproof cover is movably arranged at the top of the clear liquid cavity; the dust cover is provided with a concave cavity which is concavely arranged from one end of the clear liquid cavity to the other end of the clear liquid cavity. The dust cover covers the top of the filtering main body, so that external impurities can be prevented from polluting saline water, saline water steam is prevented from corroding equipment pipelines, consumption of pure water is reduced, white water is prevented from entering a system to be evaporated, and steam consumption is reduced.

CN223262777U.title: Frying and baking machine
CN223262777U.abstract: The utility model relates to a frying and baking machine which comprises a base assembly, an upper cover assembly and a water tank assembly, the upper cover assembly can cover the base assembly, the base assembly comprises a lower baking tray, the lower baking tray is provided with a cooking groove and a water groove, the water tank assembly is installed on the base assembly or the upper cover assembly, the water tank assembly comprises a box body and a pipeline, and the box body can be communicated with the water groove through the pipeline. A switch valve is arranged on the pipeline, the switch valve comprises a valve body and a valve element rotatably arranged in the valve body, and the switch valve controls the pipeline to be opened and closed through rotation of the valve element. According to the frying and baking machine, the water tank does not need to be filled with water before cooking, only the water needs to be added into the box body, only the valve element needs to be rotated to control opening and closing of the switch valve in the cooking process, then the box body can be controlled to add the water into the water tank or stop adding the water, steam can be rapidly generated, and the upper cover assembly does not need to be opened; therefore, the problem that the cooking effect is affected due to steam escape and rapid temperature reduction caused by uncovering and water adding is avoided.

CN223232555U.abstract: The utility model discloses a water-steam separation structure of a steam cabinet. CN120531105A.title: Preparation method of ready-to-eat cooked red date product
CN120531105A.abstract: The invention relates to a preparation method of an instant cooked red date product. The method comprises the following steps: putting a red date raw material into an electrolytic bath with tap water to be electrolyzed and rinsed for 1-10 minutes; steaming the red dates obtained by electrolytic rinsing; then drying the steamed red dates with hot air; and finally, putting the hot-air-dried red dates into a microwave drying machine for microwave drying and sterilization treatment to obtain the instant cooked red date product. The total number of bacterial colonies and the number of coliforms and molds in the ready-to-eat red date cooked product are effectively reduced through combination of alkaline electrolyzed water, steam steaming, hot air drying and microwave treatment, and the stability and safety of the eating quality of the ready-to-eat red date cooked product can be guaranteed without other preservatives; the time required by microwave treatment can be greatly shortened, and the eating quality loss of the instant red date cooked product is reduced; the water vapor steaming process changes the tissue structure of the red date pulp, and brings unique texture and taste; according to the invention, the eating quality and safety of the ready-to-eat cooked red date product are comprehensively improved.

CN223195920U.title: Water dispenser
CN223195920U.abstract: The utility model provides a water dispenser which is provided with a water inlet and a water taking port and comprises a water tank, a heating module and a water-steam separator, the water tank comprises a water tank inlet, a water tank outlet and a water tank exhaust port, the water tank inlet is connected to the water inlet, the water tank exhaust port is communicated with the atmosphere, and a water inlet of the heating module is connected to the water tank outlet. The water-steam separator comprises a separator inlet, a separator first outlet and a separator second outlet, the separator inlet is connected to the water outlet of the heating module, the separator first outlet is connected to the water taking opening, the separator second outlet is connected to the water tank inlet, and the water taking opening is lower than the water-steam separator. According to the technical scheme, in the process that a user takes hot water, generated water vapor can return to the water tank after being separated through the water-vapor separator, and water in the water tank is preheated. In this way, in the subsequent water taking process, the temperature of water heated by the heating module is higher than the normal temperature, and therefore a larger amount of hot water is provided under the limited heating power.

CN120437765A.title: Water vapor recovery device
CN120437765A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of steam recovery, in particular to a water steam recovery device which comprises a treatment assembly, an operation box and an air inlet pipe connected to the side edge of the operation box, and staggered water supply in a long pipe, a middle pipe and a short pipe is achieved through a spiral plate and a water baffle in the water inlet pipe. The pipe body and the other two pipelines can also spray weak water flow through the outer opening holes and the auxiliary holes, so that complete treatment of water vapor is guaranteed, the water vapor is changed into bubbles from water and moves upwards, and when the water vapor encounters the sprayed water flow, gas containing the water vapor is further filtered at the moment; and meanwhile, the gas is driven to move upwards through the counter-acting force of the high-pressure water flow, gas discharging is accelerated, the guided-out gas is washed through water, therefore, water vapor in the gas is left, and heat energy in the water vapor can be recycled.

CN223186706U.abstract: The utility model discloses multi-angle drying equipment for Longquan celadon production, which comprises a base and a cover body, a plurality of annular first heating rods and a plurality of brackets are arranged on the base, a plurality of annular second heating rods are arranged in the cover body at equal height, a plurality of first steam dispersing windows are arrayed on the cover body, a third heating rod is coaxially arranged in the cover body, and a plurality of second steam dispersing windows are arranged in the third heating rod. CN120402884A.title: Compression fire hot standby thermodynamic system coupled with solar heat storage and operation method
CN120402884A.abstract: The invention provides a pressing fire hot standby thermodynamic system coupled with solar heat storage and an operation method, and belongs to the field of circulating fluidized bed unit equipment. The system is provided with a solar thermal collector, a high/low-temperature fused salt tank, a fused salt-water heat exchanger and a fused salt-steam heat exchanger, wherein a fused salt outlet of the solar thermal collector, the high-temperature fused salt tank, a high-temperature fused salt pump, an eighth three-way valve, the fused salt-water heat exchanger, a seventh three-way valve, a low-temperature fused salt tank, a low-temperature fused salt pump and a fused salt inlet of the solar thermal collector are communicated in sequence; a second outlet of the eighth three-way valve communicates with a fused salt side inlet of the fused salt-steam heat exchanger, and a fused salt side outlet of the fused salt-steam heat exchanger communicates with a second inlet of the seventh three-way valve. During operation, solar energy is stored in fused salt of the high-temperature fused salt tank in a conventional state; when fire pressing hot standby is started, energy in the fused salt passes through the heat exchanger to heat feed water/steam to generate steam meeting the requirement for safe operation of the steam turbine. According to the method, the banking-up period is prolonged, and the deep peak regulation capacity is improved.

HRUM20250014U2.title: STEAM GENERATOR FOR STERILIZATION OF WOOL
HRUM20250014U2.abstract: The steam in this steam generator for wool sterilisation is most often produced in boilers heated by natural gas or electricity. The steam is distributed through steel pipes, and the operating pressure of the steam at the outlet is regulated as necessary by a pressure regulator. The water in the boiler is chemically treated as necessary to control pH values, mineral deposition and foam formation. Efficiency tests of the use of water steam for sheep wool sterilisation have shown that for optimal steam penetration and effective sterilisation, it is necessary to use steam that must be dry, so that it contains 97% steam (water vapour) and 3% water. In the case of wet steam, that is, one that has less than 97% water vapour, it has been observed that problems of poor heat transfer occur, problems in the process, such as "wet packages", a long-term decrease in system efficiency occurs, and the costs of system maintenance and operation increase.

CN223163034U.abstract: The utility model discloses a self-locking device for a hoisting buckle of a saline water injection barrel. CN223111486U.title: Water vapor separation device
CN223111486U.abstract: The utility model discloses a water vapor separation device in the technical field of drinking water equipment, which comprises a box body with a cavity inside; a water inlet pipe; the water outlet pipe comprises an upper pipe section, a transition section and a lower pipe section which are sequentially connected from top to bottom and are coaxially arranged; two partition plates; a convergence sleeve; the water retaining block is arranged on the inner top surface of the separation area and located on the left sides of the two partition plates, the periphery of the water retaining block is matched with the inner side surface of the separation area to form a split-flow steam channel, and the bottom surface of the water retaining block is matched with the inner low surface of the separation area to form a split-flow water channel; according to the utility model, the situation of remixing caused by large-area contact of separated hot water and steam is avoided, continuous separation in the flowing process can be realized, the water-steam separation effect is improved, the flowing is stable, and the phenomenon of water bifurcation caused by water flow splashing to flow out from the exhaust port is avoided; therefore, the buffer area is arranged before water is discharged, so that the impact force and the flow speed of the discharged water are reduced, and the water is taken more stably and smoothly.

CN223082981U.title: Xylose washing centrifugal machine
CN223082981U.abstract: The xylose washing centrifugal machine comprises a driving device, a transmission mechanism, a rotary drum and a shell outside the rotary drum, a centrifugal cavity is formed in the rotary drum, and a liquid-steam pipeline and a feeding port which are communicated with the centrifugal cavity are installed on the shell. And the liquid-steam pipeline comprises a liquid flow pipeline and a steam pipeline which are separately arranged or share one outlet. According to the xylose washing device, the liquid-steam pipeline is arranged, partial water washing is replaced by water steam washing, water is firstly introduced into the liquid flow pipeline, xylose mother liquor is washed, then water steam is introduced into the steam pipeline, the water steam can take away impurities on xylose particles, meanwhile, the xylose particles are prevented from being brought into the xylose mother liquor, and therefore the yield and purity of xylose are improved.

CN120331905A.title: Heating equipment
CN120331905A.abstract: The invention relates to heating equipment. The equipment comprises a first generator set, a second generator set and a heating device, the first generator set is in a high-back-pressure working condition, and the second generator set is in a low-pressure cylinder cutting working condition; the exhaust end of the first generator set communicates with a water inlet of the heating equipment and the water inlet end of the heating device, and the water outlet end of the heating device communicates with the exhaust end of the second generator set and a water outlet of the heating equipment. Inlet water flows into the heating device through the water inlet, steam generated by the first generator set in the power generation process flows into the heating device through the exhaust end of the first generator set, and the inlet water and the steam generated by the first generator set in the power generation process are heated in the heating device to form heated water. Steam generated in the power generation process of the second generator set exchanges heat with heating water through the exhaust end of the second generator set to form heating water, and the heating water flows out through the water outlet. By adopting the method, the heating effect and the power generation income of the heating equipment can be ensured.

CN223105389U.title: Water faucet
CN223105389U.abstract: The faucet comprises a water outlet nozzle and a flow dividing device arranged below the water outlet nozzle in a matched mode, the water outlet nozzle is provided with a hot water outlet cavity and a cold water outlet cavity, the flow dividing device is provided with a hot water outlet channel and a cold water outlet channel surrounding the hot water outlet channel, and the hot water outlet cavity is communicated with the hot water outlet channel. The cold water outlet cavity is communicated with the cold water outlet channel, the water outlet nozzle and the flow dividing device are matched to define a steam channel, and the steam channel is communicated with the hot water outlet channel and the cold water outlet channel. And when the hot water outlet channel discharges hot water, steam can be discharged through the steam channel and the cold water outlet channel. According to the faucet, steam is discharged through the steam channel and the cold water outlet channel, the structure is simple, the area of the cold water outlet and the area of the hot water outlet can be enlarged, the water outlet displacement per unit time is increased, the water receiving waiting time is shortened, steam condensation is facilitated, and mist is reduced.

CN120273169A.title: Laundry care apparatus
CN120273169A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of clothes care, in particular to clothes care equipment, and aims to solve the problem that large noise is generated due to the fact that a large number of bubbles generated at the outlet end of a guide pipe in an existing clothes care machine are broken after entering a clothes care cavity. In order to achieve the purpose, the clothes care equipment comprises a box body, a clothes care cavity, a steam generator and a water-steam separator, the clothes care cavity, the steam generator and the water-steam separator are arranged in the box body, the water-steam separator comprises a shell, a pressure reduction cavity is formed in the shell, an outlet communicated with the pressure reduction cavity is formed in the top of the shell, the outlet is exposed in the clothes care cavity, and an inlet is formed in the bottom of the shell; an outlet of the steam generator communicates with the first end of the guide pipe, and the second end of the guide pipe communicates with the pressure reduction cavity through an inlet and is provided with a defoaming structure. By means of the arrangement, the situation that a large number of bubbles generated at the outlet end of the guide pipe in the clothes care machine are broken after entering the clothes care cavity, and large noise is generated is avoided, and the use experience of a user is optimized.

WO2025136149A1.title: MATÉRIAU HYDROPHOBE À BASE DE GRAPHITE THERMO-EXPANSÉ MODIFIÉ
WO2025136149A1.abstract: The group of inventions relates to the field of producing carbon materials which are modified by silicon-containing compounds and exhibit enhanced hydrophobicity for the manufacture of low-density carbonaceous sorbents for removing hydrocarbons from the surface of water, or for the manufacture of graphite foil that exhibits enhanced sealing ability with respect to water, steam and aqueous media. A method for manufacturing a hydrophobic material based on thermally expanded graphite includes the steps of: saturating intercalated graphite with a composition containing at least one organosilicon compound selected from alkyl-substituted and phenyl-substituted silanes and/or polyalkyl and polyphenyl siloxanes, an aqueous solution of ammonia and an organic solvent, where the ratio of the mass of intercalated graphite to the mass of the saturating composition is equal to 1:(0.02-5); removing the excess liquid phase; drying the mixture to a free-flowing state; and heat treating the dried mixture at a temperature of from 300 to 1000°С. The invention makes it possible to produce particles of thermally expanded graphite with improved hydrophobic characteristics.

CN223026735U.title: Collecting device for biomass condensate
CN223026735U.abstract: The utility model discloses a biomass condensate collecting device which comprises a material processing container and at least one closable collecting container, and the material processing container is provided with a closable opening for feeding biomass-containing materials and a steam inlet for introducing water steam. A conveying pipeline is connected between the material processing container and the collecting container, a valve is installed on the conveying pipeline, steam is introduced into the material processing container to conduct steam processing on biomass materials, and obtained condensate is collected in a closed mode through the collecting container. And the collection container is cooled by means of external heat radiation and indirect heat exchange with air outside the collection container, so that the condensate is quickly cooled in the collection container, and the condensate is used as a microbial culture medium. The collection mode is beneficial to rapid cooling of the condensate, accelerates the cooling speed of the condensate, reduces the damage of nutrient substances in the condensate, reduces the contact between the condensate and infectious microbes, and reduces the risk of contamination of the condensate.

CN120232039A.title: Integrated cooker and control method thereof
CN120232039A.abstract: The invention relates to an integrated cooker and a control method thereof. The integrated cooker comprises a main machine, and a steam generator, a cooking box, a smoke exhaust fan and a cleaning device which are arranged in the main machine. The steam generator is provided with an instant heating channel and a vaporization cavity, and a heating pipe is further arranged on the steam generator. The instant heating channel is provided with a water inlet end and a water outlet end. The vaporization cavity is provided with a steam inlet and a steam outlet. The water outlet end is communicated with the steam inlet, a communicating channel between the water outlet end and the steam inlet is provided with a cleaning outlet and a switcher, the cleaning outlet is communicated with the outside, and the switcher opens the steam inlet or the cleaning outlet. And the steam exhaust port is communicated with the cooking cavity of the inner container of the cooking box and introduces steam into the cooking cavity. The cleaning outlet is communicated with and introduces hot water, steam or a mixture of hot water and steam into the cleaning device, and the cleaning device sprays the cooking cavity or the impeller. Only one steam generator is arranged, so that cooking steam can be provided for the cooking box, and hot water, steam or a mixture of hot water and steam for cleaning can be provided for the cooking cavity and the impeller of the cooking box.

WO2026045815A1.title: STRUCTURE D'ENCAPSULATION POUR MODULE DE PUCE ET SON PROCÉDÉ D'ENCAPSULATION
WO2026045815A1.abstract: Provided in the present invention are a packaging structure for a chip module and a packaging method therefor. The packaging structure comprises a substrate, at least one filter chip, a separation film and a molding compound layer. The filter chip is disposed on the substrate, the front surface of the filter chip faces the substrate, and a first gap is formed between the filter chip and the substrate; the separation film covers the side wall and the back surface of the filter chip and part of the surface of the substrate, so as to encapsulate the first gap and form a sealed first cavity between the filter chip and the substrate, and a second gap is provided between the edge of the separation film and the edge of the substrate; and the molding compound layer covers the remaining surface of the substrate and the separation film. Due to the second gap between the edge of the separation film and the edge of the substrate, the separation film is wrapped by the molding compound layer without being exposed to the air. When the packaging structure for a chip module operates in a high-humidity environment, water vapor cannot penetrate into the first cavity by means of the separation film, thereby avoiding the problem of performance degradation or even failure of the filter chip.

UA162222U.title: METHOD FOR INCREASING GEOMETRIC DIMENSIONS AND TEMPERATURE OF PYROLYSIS GAS COMBUSTION MASS IN SOLID FUEL HEATING DEVICES
UA162222U.abstract: Method for increasing geometric dimensions and temperature of pyrolysis gas combustion mass in solid fuel heating devices, in which solid heterogeneous carbonaceous raw materials-waste are compacted by loading it into a heating chamber that has an adjustable connection to the combustion chamber by at least one main line. Solid heterogeneous carbonaceous raw materials are heated in the heating chamber. Pyrolysis gases are released from solid heterogeneous carbonaceous raw materials-waste by heating, pyrolysis gases are moved to the combustion chamber, where they are burned, excess heat and exhaust gases are removed into the ambient air through the exhaust line. Additionally, during the combustion of pyrolysis gases in the combustion chamber, the air is rotated counterclockwise relative to the vertical by a vortex to the horizon and heated in the range from 600 to 900 °C. The combustion array is magnetized from the outside by a magnetic field with a magnetic induction Br of 1.45 to 1.48 T and magnetic energy BH of 398 to 422 kJ/m3, and water is fed into the heating chamber from the outside at a rate and volume of 1 to 10 drops per second. The water inside the heating chamber is heated to the state of superheated water vapor. The superheated water vapor is circulated with heated air. The superheated water vapor is fed into the pyrolysis gas combustion array, increasing the geometric dimensions and temperature of the pyrolysis gas combustion array from 1600 to 1800 °C with superheated water vapor. The release of combustion gases is regulated depending on the intensity of the flame.

US20260061385A1.title: MASS PRODUCTION APPARATUS FOR HIGH-PURITY LITHIUM SULFIDE
US20260061385A1.abstract: When producing lithium sulfide by a reaction between a lithium raw material and hydrogen sulfide, the reaction is performed under relatively mild conditions compared to the conventional technology, so frequent repairs or replacements due to corrosion and breakdown of reactors and piping are not required, thereby improving the economic efficiency of the process. Since unreacted hydrogen sulfide and a solvent from which moisture has been removed are reused, process costs are reduced so that economic feasibility in mass production is ensured. Furthermore, moisture and water vapor generated in a lithium sulfide production reaction are effectively removed to prevent a reverse reaction into lithium hydroxide and promote a forward reaction so that high-quality lithium sulfide can be produced with high purity and high yield. In addition, particle size may be controlled in the micrometer range without a separate crushing space or crushing stage, thereby providing excellent convenience and mass production.

US20260062291A1.title: MASS PRODUCTION METHOD FOR HIGH-PURITY LITHIUM SULFIDE USING INERT GAS BUBBLING
US20260062291A1.abstract: The present invention relates to a method of producing lithium sulfide, and according to the present invention, when producing lithium sulfide by a reaction between a lithium raw material and hydrogen sulfide, the reaction is performed under relatively mild conditions compared to the conventional technology, so frequent repairs or replacements due to corrosion and breakdown of reactors and piping are not required, thereby improving the economic efficiency of the process. In addition, since unreacted hydrogen sulfide and a solvent from which moisture has been removed are reused, process costs are reduced so that economic feasibility in mass production is ensured. Furthermore, moisture and water vapor generated in a lithium sulfide production reaction are effectively removed to prevent a reverse reaction into lithium hydroxide and promote a forward reaction so that high-quality lithium sulfide can be produced with high purity and high yield.

US20260063035A1.abstract: A lunar regolith reduction reactor system includes a housing, a crucible, and a pair of electrodes. The housing includes a base structure and a cover structure detachably connected to the base structure, a gas input port to permit input of hydrogen gas into the housing, and a gas output port to permit outgassing of water vapor and gases. US20260062588A1.title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING MODIFIED POLYSILAZANE CURED COATING, AND MODIFIED POLYSILAZANE CURED COATING
US20260062588A1.abstract: A method is provided for producing a modified polysilazane-cured coating that densifies a coating made of a polysilazane compound in a short period of time. This method provides a coating having a sufficiently low water vapor transmission rate in a short period of time. Additionally, this method provides a modified polysilazane-cured coating. To cure the coating containing polysilazane, it is irradiated with vacuum ultraviolet (VUV) light at an intensity within a specific range. The method includes a step of applying a base material containing the polysilazane compound represented by formula (1) to form a coating and irradiating the coating with Xe excimer light to modify the polysilazane compound and form a cured coating of the modified polysilazane compound. The illuminance of the Xe excimer light in the curing step is set to a range of 280 to 450 mW/cm2.

WO2026040596A1.title: PROCÉDÉ ET APPAREIL DE TRAITEMENT DE STRUCTURE D'EMPILEMENT DE PUCES
WO2026040596A1.abstract: Provided in the embodiments of the present application are a chip stacking structure processing method and apparatus. The method comprises: placing a chip stacking structure in a processing chamber; evacuating the processing chamber, such that the pressure in the processing chamber reaches a first negative pressure value; within a first time period, keeping the pressure in the processing chamber below the first negative pressure value, such that moisture in the chip stacking structure is evaporated into water vapor; and within a second time period, continuously introducing a drying fluid into the processing chamber, so as to dry the water vapor, wherein the second time period is longer than the first time period. The chip stacking structure processing method and apparatus in the present application can effectively dry a chip stacking structure.

WO2026040863A1.abstract: Provided are a highly reflective glaze layer having a composite structure and a manufacturing method therefor, a back sheet glass, and a photovoltaic module. Said highly reflective glaze layer is provided on a glass substrate (3), and comprises a surface layer (1) and a reflective layer (2), the surface layer (1) covering the surface and side surfaces of the reflective layer (2), and the tail end of the surface layer (1) being in contact with the surface of the glass substrate (3). The surface layer (1) is a high-temperature bonding-phase accumulation layer, and the reflective layer (2) is a white filler accumulation layer. Said highly reflective glaze layer has a dense surface and a significantly layered structure, and thus can form multi-gradient reflection and has excellent reflection ability, so that gap light can be more fully recovered and utilized. In addition, the glaze layer further exhibits greatly improved water vapor insulation and electrical insulation properties and passes both a 96-hour PCT and a 192-hour PID test.

US20260058172A1.abstract: A humidifier for humidifying a dry supply air stream via a humid exhaust air stream may include a housing, a membrane block with a plurality of membranes, and at least one baffle. WO2026034774A1.title: PROCÉDÉ DE PRÉPARATION DE SULFURE DE LITHIUM
WO2026034774A1.abstract: The present invention relates to a method for preparing lithium sulfide. According to the present invention, when preparing lithium sulfide by a reaction between a lithium raw material and hydrogen sulfide, the reaction is carried out under relatively mild conditions as compared to the prior art, and thus frequent repair or replacement due to corrosion and failure of a reactor and various piping is not required, thereby improving the economic feasibility of the process. In addition, by reusing unreacted hydrogen sulfide from which moisture has been removed and a solvent, process costs are reduced, thereby ensuring economic feasibility during mass production. Furthermore, moisture and water vapor generated by the lithium sulfide production reaction are effectively removed, thus preventing a reverse reaction back to lithium hydroxide and promoting a forward reaction, thus enabling the production of high-quality lithium sulfide with high purity and high yield. In addition, particle size adjustment can be achieved in units of μm without a separate pulverization space or pulverization step, thereby providing excellent convenience and mass production.

WO2026034741A1.title: APPAREIL DE PRODUCTION DE BIOCHARBON POREUX À HAUTE PERFORMANCE
WO2026034741A1.abstract: Disclosed is an apparatus for manufacturing a high-performance porous biochar, capable of preventing water vapor and gas in a carbonization facility from leaking to the outside, and preventing a coking phenomenon in which livestock manure remaining in a carbonization furnace adheres to the inner circumferential surface of the carbonization furnace. The apparatus for manufacturing a high-performance porous biochar comprises: a livestock manure supply facility for supplying and transferring a large amount of livestock manure containing moisture; and a carbonization facility for, when the livestock manure is input from the livestock manure supply facility, creating an oxygen-blocked atmosphere within the carbonization facility and heating the carbonization facility to a predetermined temperature to carbonize the livestock manure, wherein the livestock manure supply facility is configured to automatically open and close an outlet according to whether the livestock manure is discharged, and seal a connection portion between the livestock manure supply facility and the carbonization facility.

WO2026035320A1.title: SPECTROSCOPIE DE POLARISATION À EFFET STARK ET PROCÉDÉS
WO2026035320A1.abstract: A method of and system for monitoring the level of hydrogen peroxide gas in a system such as an isolation barrier. Gas is sampled from the system to a gas cell. The sampled gas may include hydrogen peroxide gas and water vapor. A laser beam from a laser source at a known polarization state is passed through the gas cell and the hydrogen peroxide gas and water vapor therein. An electrical field is created in the gas cell to reduce optical interference from water vapor while preserving the ability to more accurately measure the concentration of hydrogen peroxide gas in the gas cell. A change in the polarization state of the laser beam after passage through the gas cell is detected. Based on the detected change in the polarization state of the laser beam, the concentration of the hydrogen peroxide gas in the gas cell is determined.

WO2026031924A1.title: ÉCRAN D'AFFICHAGE ET SON PROCÉDÉ DE PRÉPARATION, ET APPAREIL D'AFFICHAGE
WO2026031924A1.abstract: Provided in the present application are a display panel and a preparation method therefor, and a display apparatus. The display panel comprises a display area and a non-display area located on at least one side of the display area. The display panel comprises a substrate, a driving circuit, an inorganic layer, an organic layer and hydrophobic particles, wherein the substrate is located in the display area and the non-display area; the driving circuit is located in the non-display area; the inorganic layer is located on the side of the driving circuit away from the substrate, is located at least in the non-display area, and covers the driving circuit; the organic layer is located on the side of the inorganic layer away from the substrate, and is located in the display area and the non-display area; the organic layer is provided with at least one groove running through the organic layer, and the groove is located in the non-display area; and the hydrophobic particles are located on the side of the driving circuit away from the substrate, and are at least some of the hydrophobic particles are filled in the groove. In this way, the speed of water vapor eroding a display panel can be slowed down, thereby prolonging the service life of the display panel.

WO2026033985A1.title: SYSTÈME DE PRODUCTION D'HYDROGÈNE
WO2026033985A1.abstract: Provided is a hydrogen production system (40) which comprises: an exhaust heat reception unit (41) that receives exhaust heat generated by an external exhaust heat source (11); a water vapor generation unit (42) that generates water vapor by heating water by means of the exhaust heat received by the exhaust heat reception unit (41); a cell stack (43) that electrolyzes the water vapor generated by the water vapor generation unit (42) so as to generate hydrogen; and a replenishment unit (44) that, when the amount of exhaust heat is insufficient with respect to the amount necessary for generating the required amount of water vapor, replenishes water, water vapor, or the water vapor generation unit (42) with heat, or replenishes the cell stack (43) with water vapor from an external water vapor supply source (95).

WO2026034252A1.title: POUDRE À STRUCTURE ORGANOMÉTALLIQUE
WO2026034252A1.abstract: When a basic structure MOF that has only a ligand having two or more functional groups for coordination is specified as a ligand on the basis of the result of powder XRD analysis of this metal organic framework powder, the basic structure MOF has an octahedral particle shape. In an SEM image including 10 or more primary particles which have a particle diameter of 0.1 µm or more and in which at least one or more whole particle surfaces can be observed, if a ridge line having a length of 20 nm or less in a primary particle is assumed to be a point, the ratio of the number of primary particles in which all observed surfaces are triangular to the total number of primary particles observed is less than 40%. In the water vapor adsorption isotherm at 298 K, the ratio of the water vapor adsorption amount per unit volume of the metal organic framework powder to the water vapor adsorption amount per unit volume of the basic structure MOF when the relative pressure is 0.95 is 84% or more.

US20260042684A1.title: DESALINATION AND CRYSTALLIZATION SYSTEM OPERATING WITHOUT BRINE
US20260042684A1.abstract: A zero liquid brine desalination and crystallization system includes a humidification dehumidification (HDH) desalination system and includes a crystallization system. The HDH system includes a humidifier configured to humidify a carrier gas using saline water, and a dehumidifier configured to dehumidify the carrier gas to obtain desalinated water. The crystallization system is configured to receive the saline water from the HDH desalination system and includes an evaporation chamber configured to produce salt crystals and water vapor from the saline water, and a condenser configured to condense the water vapor. Herein, the HDH desalination system and the crystallization system are connected at the condenser for heat exchange between the water vapor and at least one selected from the group consisting of the saline water and the carrier gas.

US20260041802A1.title: MODULAR HYDROXYL RADICAL GENERATION AND OZONE-BASED DISINFECTION SYSTEM
US20260041802A1.abstract: The present invention relates to modular ozone-based disinfection systems that generate hydroxyl radicals (·OH) from ozone and water vapor using a high-temperature catalyst module. The system includes a purification configuration with an air inlet, air circulation subsystem, airflow path, and air outlet, along with a water supply configuration feeding purified water to an electrolytic ozone generator. A catalyst module, such as a PTC heating element, heats ozone-containing air to a hydroxyl radical generation temperature, while a downstream hydroxyl augmentation and ozone reduction module converts residual ozone and conditions the airflow for safe discharge. Embodiments may include a replaceable water cartridge, resin tank, multiple water source options, humidity and purity sensors, and a safety interlock connected to a controller. The modular design supports portable, fixed, or refrigerated installations, enabling on-demand hydroxyl radical production with integrated control, safety, and discharge verification for advanced air and surface disinfection.

MX2025009540A.title: JOHNSON AMBIENT ENERGY CONVERTER
MX2025009540A.abstract: An environmental energy converter includes a housing having an upper portion and a lower portion. The lower housing portion has a hydrophobic material portion. The upper portion has a vent opening in fluid communication with the environment. The housing contains a hygroscopic mass within the lower housing portion that is in fluid communication with the hydrophobic material portion. An ion-electrode conducting membrane assembly is coupled to the housing to allow the passage of ionized water or water vapor through the ion-electrode conducting membrane and into contact with the hygroscopic solution. An air duct may be coupled to the housing to provide an airflow to the ion-electrode conducting membrane and/or to the hydrophobic material portion.

US20260038853A1.abstract: A control method of a fuel cell system according to the present disclosure uses a fuel cell system including a raw material supply system configured to supply a raw material, a water vapor supply system configured to supply water vapor to the raw material supply system, a fuel cell configured to generate electric energy from hydrogen generated from the raw material and an oxidizing agent, and a recycle gas system configured to circulate a recycle gas, which is at least a part of an anode off-gas discharged from an anode of the fuel cell, to the raw material supply system.
