CN218329411U.abstract: The utility model provides a steam shell-and-tube heat exchanger combination device for heating a hydrogen medium, which is characterized in that one side of a heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen inlet pipeline connected with a pneumatic ball valve, and the upper end of the heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen inlet pipeline connected with an electric gate valve A; the other side of the heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen outlet pipeline connected with a hydrogen temperature switch and a hydrogen temperature transmitter, a liquid level transmitter is installed on a shell of the heat exchanger, and the lower end of the heat exchanger is sequentially connected with an electric gate valve B, a pneumatic control valve, a drain valve and a return water temperature transmitter through a pipeline. And the accuracy and safety of leak detection are improved.

CN216113367U.title: Gas safety shield system of hydrogen refueling station
CN216113367U.abstract: The utility model discloses a gas safety shield system of a hydrogen refueling station. The gas safety shield system comprises a hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module, a hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module, a hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module, a three-level alarming system, a feedback processing system and a central control platform, the hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module comprises a hydrogen-sensitive color change sensing patch adhesive tape, a camera and an AI big data platform, and is linked with a three-level alarm system; the hydrogen leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed electrochemical principle hydrogen detector and a hydrogen alarming controller, and is linked with a three-stage alarming system and a feedback processing system; and the hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed combustible gas detector based on a catalytic combustion principle, and is linked with a three-stage alarming system and a feedback processing system. The gas safety shield system of the hydrogen refueling station has the advantages of being wide in leakage monitoring coverage range, high in automation degree, safe, efficient and capable of achieving three-dimensional and comprehensive monitoring data and having a grading alarm function.

CN216091392U.title: Wearable device capable of introducing hydrogen
CN216091392U.abstract: The utility model relates to a wearable device capable of introducing hydrogen, and belongs to the technical field of instruments for inputting a hydrogen medium into a human body. The device comprises a hydrogen source and a wearing article which can be worn on a human body; a sealing piece is arranged at each opening of the wearing article, and a hydrogen outlet of the hydrogen source is located in the wearing article; in the using process, when the wearing article is worn on the human body, the hydrogen source is opened, and then the opening of the wearing article is sealed through the sealing piece, hydrogen generated by the hydrogen source continuously enters the inner space, making contact with the human body, of the wearing article from the hydrogen outlet. The device is small in size and convenient to carry, and a user can freely move.

MY180112A.title: NUCLEAR FUEL PELLET HAVING ENHANCED THERMAL CONDUCTIVITY, AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREOF
MY180112A.abstract: The invention relates to nuclear physics, and specifically to reactor fuel elements and units thereof, and particularly to the composition of solid ceramic fuel elements based on uranium dioxide, intended for and exhibiting characteristics for being used in variously-purposed nuclear reactors. The result consists in a more reliable, special structure and a simple composition of uranium dioxide without heterogeneous fuel pellet additives, approaching the characteristics of a monocrystal having enhanced, and specifically exceeding reference data, thermal conductivity as temperature increases, and a simple production method thereof. The result is achieved in that pores of between 1 and 5 microns in size are distributed along the perimeters of grains in the micro-structure of each metal cluster in a nuclear fuel pellet, and in that located within the grains are pores which are predominantly nano-sized. In addition, the metal clusters comprise between 0.01 and 1.0 percent by mass. The invention provides for a method of preparing a nuclear fuel pellet, including precipitating metal hydroxides, in two stages, having different pH levels. Uranium metal is melted at a temperature exceeding 1150?C, sintering is carried out in an insignificant amount of liquid phase at a temperature ranging between 1600 and 2200?C in a hydrogen medium until forming uranium dioxide, the structure of which includes metal clusters dispersed therein. An X-ray photon spectroscope is used for identifying the new structure of the UO2 pellet and the additional U-U chemical bond.

CN215258148U.title: High-pressure valve for hydrogen medium
CN215258148U.abstract: The utility model discloses a high-pressure valve for hydrogen medium, which comprises a valve body, a sectional type valve rod and a sealing filler, the sectional type valve rod is arranged in the valve body and comprises an upper section valve rod and a lower section valve rod, the diameter of the upper section valve rod is smaller than that of the lower section valve rod, and the connection transition position of the upper section valve rod and the lower section valve rod is a conical surface; the upper section valve rod is sleeved with the sealing filler, the sealing filler is connected with the upper section valve rod in a sealing contact fit mode, and the lower portion of the sealing filler is provided with an inner inverted-cone-shaped face matched with the cone-shaped face in a sealing contact fit mode. The sectional type valve rod is divided into an upper sealing section and a lower auxiliary sealing section, the sealing filler extrudes and tightly holds the upper section of the valve rod to form sealing during upper sealing, and the conical surface of the lower section of the valve rod abuts against the sealing gasket at the middle bottom of the sealing filler during lower auxiliary sealing, so that the sealing gasket is not only pre-tightening force brought by a pressing nut, but also the sealing gasket is not easy to deform. External pressure is obtained at the key position of sealing, so that the valve rod and the sealing filler are matched more tightly, and sealing is more reliable.

CN113653939A.title: Gas safety shield system of hydrogen refueling station
CN113653939A.abstract: The invention discloses a gas safety shield system of a hydrogen refueling station. The gas safety shield system comprises a hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module, a hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module, a hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module, a three-stage alarming system, a feedback processing system and a central control platform; the hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module comprises a hydrogen-sensitive color change sensing patch adhesive tape, a camera and an AI big data platform, and is linked with the three-stage alarm system; the hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed electrochemical principle hydrogen detector and a hydrogen alarming controller, and is linked with the three-stage alarming system and the feedback processing system; and the hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed combustible gas detector based on a catalytic combustion principle, and is linked with the three-stage alarming system and the feedback processing system. The gas safety shield system of the hydrogen refueling station provided by the invention has the characteristics of wide leakage monitoring coverage range, high automation degree, safety, high efficiency, three-dimensional and comprehensive monitoring data and graded alarm function.

CN214564664U.title: Hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly
CN214564664U.abstract: The utility model discloses a hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly. The hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly comprises a first connector, a second connector, a right caliper wire harness connector, a left caliper wire harness connector, a motor controller connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 1 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 2 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 3 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 4 connector and a hydrogen concentration sensor connector. A hydrogen high-pressure pressure sensor connector, a hydrogen medium-pressure pressure sensor connector and a buckle. The connectors are connected to each other through the first to eleventh wires. The hydrogen fuel cell wire harness assembly is simple in structure, attractive in appearance, firm and durable, can be stably installed on a vehicle chassis body, and effectively prolongs the service life of the hydrogen fuel cell wire harness assembly.

CN212774751U.title: Self-heating claw type hydrogen circulating pump for fuel cell system
CN212774751U.abstract: The utility model discloses a self-heating claw type hydrogen circulating pump for a fuel cell system, which comprises a circulating pump body, a gear box, a motor and a controller, and the circulating pump body, the gear box, the motor and the controller are connected through first screws and form reliable sealing through an O-shaped ring; wherein the circulating pump body comprises a hydrogen pump shell, and a claw rotor A and a claw rotor B are arranged in the hydrogen pump shell; and the claw-shaped rotor A and the claw-shaped rotor B are respectively arranged in the gear shaft A and the gear shaft B in an interference fit manner. The hydrogen pump has the advantages that it can be guaranteed that lubricating oil in the gearbox cannot enter the hydrogen pump body, a hydrogen medium cannot be polluted, the problem that the hydrogen pump cannot be started after low-temperature icing in the actual using process is solved, the problem that hydrogen pressurization is difficult is solved, and meanwhile good efficiency and low-level noise are achieved.

UA65632C2.title: METHOD FOR PRODUCTION OF IRON POWDER IN UNITS OF CONTINUOUS OPERATION
UA65632C2.abstract: Invention relates to special treatment of metal powders, predominantly to the processes of reduction and reducing annealing of metal powders with use of a gaseous reducer, and it can be used in the processes of chemicothermal treatment of powder materials in powder metallurgy. The method for production of iron powder in the units of continuous operation includes reduction of iron oxides in the hydrogen medium, grinding of reduced material, annealing and cooling in the medium of fresh hydrogen with subsequent grinding of the annealed material. The deep-dried hydrogen is subject to cooling and annealing, the moisture content in which makes 0.004 - 0.062 per cent by volume. The hydrogen after annealing is cooled, purified to the moisture content of 1.7 - 4.5 per cent by volume, compressed and reduced. After reduction the hydrogen is selected, cooled, cleaned, hydrated, cooled and dried to the moisture content of 0.1 - 0.8 per cent by volume and reduced material is cooled. The resulting hydrogen after cooling of reduced material is mixed with purified hydrogen after annealing and is reduced. Invention ensures the completeness of hydrogen use as a chemical agent and improves the quality of produced powder with reduction of power consumption.

UA50370C2.title: catalyst for electrochemical isolation or oxidation of HYDROgen and a method for producing thereof
UA50370C2.abstract: A method for producing catalyst for electrochemical isolation or oxidation of hydrogen, which method provides carrying out the thermal treatment of catalyst material in hydrogen medium, at that the thermal treatment is carried out in two stages: at the first stage - at the temperature of 750-850°С during 15-25 minutes, at the second - at the temperature of 250-330°С during 30-45 minutes. Diamonds with the specific surface of not less than 150 m2/g are used as catalyst material for making hydrogen electrodes for fuel elements.

UA71274A.abstract: The proposed method for producing permanent magnets from Dd-Fe-B alloy consists in providing the thermal treatment and the dispersion of the alloy, pressing the permanent magnet workpieces in magnetic field, and sintering and thermally treating the workpieces. CN115727173A.title: Long-life air valve for high-pressure hydrogen compressor
CN115727173A.abstract: The invention discloses a long-life air valve for a high-pressure hydrogen compressor, and belongs to the technical field of compressors. Comprising an air inlet valve and an air outlet valve, and each of the air inlet valve and the air outlet valve comprises a guide valve cover, a valve plate, a valve seat and a spring; the guide valve cover comprises a valve cover shell and a non-metal valve cover lining arranged in the valve cover shell; the valve cover shell is made of a hydrogen embrittlement resistant material, and the hydrogen embrittlement resistant material is a 316 stainless steel material subjected to cold deformation strengthening; the valve cover lining is made of any non-metal material of a carbon fiber reinforced PEEK (Polyether Ether Ketone) material, a PTFE (Polytetrafluoroethylene) material and silver-dipped graphite; and the valve plate is made of a GH2132 alloy material. The valve element can be suitable for a hydrogen medium compressor with the high pressure ranging from 45 MPa to 90 MPa, and the valve element has high mechanical strength, high temperature resistance, long fatigue life and hydrogen embrittlement resistance; wear-resisting and self-lubricating properties are achieved, and abrasive particles are not prone to being generated to pollute media; and the situation that the valve plate is jammed or fails due to high temperature generated by friction is avoided.

CN211694341U.title: Industrial liquid hydrogen storage device based on argon, nitrogen and hydrogen three-level heat preservation layer
CN211694341U.abstract: The utility model discloses an industrial liquid hydrogen storage device based on an argon, nitrogen and hydrogen three-stage heat preservation layer. A three-stage heat preservation layer of the device is subjected to heat preservation by a supercritical argon outer layer; cold nitrogen interlayer heat preservation, the hydrogen medium inner layer is insulated; a high-pressure argon cooling heatexchanger is arranged in the supercritical argon outer-layer heat preservation device, a hot end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an outlet of an air separation argon supplementing and compressing argon water cooler, and a hot end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an inlet of a supercritical argon outer-layer heat preservation stop valve; wherein a cold end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is respectively connected with a stop valve outlet of the air separation waste nitrogen entering the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger and an outlet of the evaporated hydrogen emptying stop valve, and a cold end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with othersubsystems (evaporated hydrogen is used for other purposes, and waste nitrogen enters an air separation water cooling system). The liquid hydrogen heat preservation device is good in heat preservationperformance and excellent in sealing performance, and the liquid hydrogen heat preservation efficiency is greatly improved.

UA36550C2.title: METHOD FOR PROCESSING WASTE OF CERAMIC-METAL SOLID ALLOYS CONTAINING CARBIDES OF REFRACTORY METALS
UA36550C2.abstract: The invention relates to the field of powder metallurgy, in particular, to method of processing waste products of solid firm alloys containing carbides of refractory metals, mainly those that can form nitrides of titan, tantalum, and niobium: (TiN, TaN, NbN). The method of processing waste products of ceramic-metal solid alloys containing carbides of refractory metals according to which is carried out preliminary oxidation of waste products of ceramic-metal alloys by gas containing oxygen, final processing by this gas of waste products before their complete oxidation, reduction by gaseous reducer and carbidization in methane-hydrogen medium. The carbidization is carried out at temperature of 1250-1350 °C and concentration of methane - 0.30 - 0.35 percent by volume. The invention provides the possibility of formation of solid (Ті, W)C and stoichiometric composition of mix by carbon and due to this is improvement the adaptability to manufacture of solid alloy and its durability.

CN211040479U.title: Refinery hydrogen compression configuration system
CN211040479U.abstract: The utility model provides a hydrogen compression configuration system for a refinery plant. New hydrogen with different concentrations is uniformly concentrated to 99% concentration through a PSA device; the amount of new hydrogen to be compressed is increased; the possibility that a centrifugal compressor is adopted for initial compression is increased, and the concentrated hydrogen medium enables new hydrogen to pass through series-parallel duplex combination of multiple units such as a centrifugal middle-pumping type compressor unit and a reciprocating compressor unit and a centrifugal compressor unit and a reciprocating compressor unit and a screw compressor unit according to the hydrogen consumption and the hydrogen pressure. The hydrogen compression configuration system replaces a new hydrogen compressor unit which is conventionally and dispersedly arranged at each device at the rear end of a hydrogen pipe network in a refinery plant; energy intensification and cascade supply ofnew hydrogen media are achieved at the front end of a hydrogen pipe network in a series-parallel connection composite integration mode of multiple units, the number and occupied area of hydrogen compression devices are effectively reduced, the problem that operation management of all the devices is scattered is solved, and the purposes of function intensification, device intensification, land intensification and operation intensification are achieved.

CN211503776U.title: Hydrogen low-temperature heat exchanger
CN211503776U.abstract: The utility model discloses a hydrogen low-temperature heat exchanger, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen precooling. The device comprises a cold liquid container and a spiral coil, wherein the cold liquid container is of a cylindrical columnar structure; a cold liquid inlet and a cold liquid outlet are formed in the end part of the cold liquid container; the spiral coil is wound in the cold liquid container in the axial direction of the cold liquid container, the two ends of the spiral coil penetrate through the two ends of the cold liquid container in the spiral tangential direction of the spiral coil respectively and are connected with the cold liquid container in a sealed mode, and a hydrogen inlet and a hydrogen outlet are formed in the two ends of the spiral coil respectively; by implementing the technical scheme, the technical problem that an existing gaseous hydrogen precooling technology is low in heat exchange efficiency can be effectively solved; according to thehydrogen cold liquid container, the heat exchange efficiency of cold liquid and gaseous hydrogen can be effectively improved, the hydrogen medium and the cold liquid medium form a hedging heat exchange mode in the cold liquid container, heat exchange of the two media is more sufficient and beneficial, the phenomenon of bulging caused by cold liquid stress concentration in the cold liquid container can be effectively prevented, and the hydrogen cold liquid container has good practicability in field practice.

CN211118745U.title: Integrated hydrogenation port
CN211118745U.abstract: The utility model discloses an integrated hydrogenation port. Relating to the field of hydrogen supply systems, the device comprises a hydrogenation port, a pressure release valve, a temperature sensor and a low-voltage power supply, a pressure relief opening is formed in the side wall of the hydrogenation opening, one end of the pressure relief valve is inserted into the pressure relief opening,the pressure relief valve is communicated with the first gas channel in the hydrogenation opening, a mounting opening is formed in the side wall of the pressure relief valve, the temperature sensor ismounted in the mounting opening, the lower end of the temperature sensor extends into the second gas channel in the pressure relief valve, and the low-voltage power supply supplies power to the temperature sensor. According to the integrated hydrogenation port, the temperature sensor collects the temperature in the hydrogenation port, active and passive double safety protection of the overtemperature problem of a gas source is achieved in the 70 MPa ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen medium environment, and when the ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen medium is filled in an overpressure mode, the pressure release valve can immediately jump to discharge the ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen medium; according to the hydrogenation port, the potential safety hazard problems of overpressure filling and overtemperature of the hydrogenation port in an ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen medium environment are solved.

CN111075524A.title: Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system
CN111075524A.abstract: The invention relates to a Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system. The Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system comprises a protection cover, a metal hydrogen-storagematerial reaction bed B1, a metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2, a hydrogen heat exchanger, a heat exchanger, an air heat exchanger, a hydrogen expansion machine and a liquid-hydrogen high-pressure pump, wherein the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1, the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2, the hydrogen heat exchanger, the heat exchanger, the air heat exchanger, the hydrogen expansion machine and the liquid-hydrogen high-pressure pump are arranged in the protection cover. The metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1 and the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2 are connected with the hydrogen expansion machine through a shell side of the hydrogen heat exchanger and a shell side of the air heat exchanger respectively, and a hydrogen medium returns to the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1 and the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2 through a tube side of the hydrogen heat exchanger and a tube side of the heat exchanger. By using the characteristics of hydrogen absorption and hydrogen desorption of a metal hydride, the expansion machine is driven to work.

CN111043523A.title: Integrated hydrogenation port
CN111043523A.abstract: The invention discloses an integrated hydrogenation port, and relates to the field of hydrogen supply systems. The integrated hydrogenation port comprises a hydrogenation port, a pressure relief valve, a temperature sensor and a low-pressure power supply, a pressure relief port is formed in the side wall of the hydrogenation port, one end of the pressure relief valve is inserted into the pressurerelief port, the pressure relief valve communicates with a first air channel in the hydrogenation port, a mounting port is formed in the side wall of the pressure relief valve, the temperature sensoris mounted in the mounting port, the lower end of the temperature sensor extends into a second air channel in the pressure relief valve, and the low-pressure power supply supplies power for the temperature sensor. According to the integrated hydrogenation port, the temperature in the hydrogenation port is collected by the temperature sensor, the active and passive double safety protection of the over-temperature problem of a gas resource is achieved under the environment of a 70 MPa ultra-high pressure hydrogen medium, when the overpressure filling of the ultra-high pressure hydrogen medium occurs, the pressure relief valve can immediate jump to discharge excess gases, and the occurrence of various overpressure accidents is avoided; and the potential safety problems of overpressure fillingand over temperature in the environment of the ultra-high pressure hydrogen medium are solved by the hydrogenation port.

CN110793860A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-pressure hydrogen test system and method. The high-pressure hydrogen test system comprises a closed box body; one side of the closed box body is sequentially provided with a driving gas input port, a hydrogen input port and a nitrogen input port, and the other side of the closed box body is sequentially provided with a vacuumizing interface, a pressure relief interface, and a breathing port; a first-stage pneumatic booster pump is arranged in the closed box body; the first-stage pneumatic booster pump is respectively connected with a cooler and a filter I througha pipeline; the filter I is orderly connected with a stop valve I and a pneumatic valve I; the pneumatic valve I is respectively connected with a hydrogen gas cylinder and a nitrogen gas cylinder through the pipeline; the cooler is connected with a filter II; and the filter II is connected with a two-stage pneumatic booster pump through the pipeline. CN110779695A.abstract: The invention discloses a blasting test system. The blasting test system comprises a safety protection device, a filling and discharging device and a gas distribution device. CN110748786A.title: Device based on argon, nitrogen and positive hydrogen three-stage thermal insulation layers for industrial storage liquid hydrogen
CN110748786A.abstract: The invention discloses a device based on argon, nitrogen and positive hydrogen three-stage thermal insulation layers for industrial storage liquid hydrogen. The device is composed of a supercriticalargon insulation outer layer, a cold nitrogen insulation middle layer and a hydrogen medium insulation inner layer, wherein the supercritical argon insulation outer layer is internally provided with ahigh-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger, a hot end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with air separation argon supplement and a compressed argon water cooler outlet correspondingly, and a hot end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with a supercritical argon inlet supercritical argon insulation outer layer stop valve inlet; and a cold end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an air separation polluted nitrogen inlet high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger stop valve outlet and an evaporative hydrogen evacuation stop valve outlet correspondingly, and a cold end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with other subsystems (evaporated hydrogen is usedfor other purposes, and a polluted nitrogen air separation water cooling system). The device has the advantages of being good in heat preservation performance, excellent in sealing performance and capable of greatly improving the liquid hydrogen insulation efficiency.

RU2387697C1.title: METHOD AND UNIT FOR PREPARATION AND FINE PROCESSING OF HYDROCARBON STOCK
RU2387697C1.abstract: FIELD: oil and gas production. ^ SUBSTANCE: invention refers to a method of preparing and fine processing of hydrocarbon stock involving heating of stock and hydrogen, preparation of end-products; herewith liquid (oil, black oil, oil refining and petrochemistry remains) charge stock is heated up to the temperature above 20-50C and exposed to thermal and/or thermomechanical (non-catalytic) cracking, molecular hydrogen and/or hydrogen enriched light hydrogenous mediums (natural or accompanying gas, gas and light fractions of oil refining and petrochemistry), if required are heated up separately from charge stock, supplied at greater pressure than that of the heating stage, to the stage of producing active atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals to a reactor or reactor package with a catalyst heated to the required temperature, thereafter produced active hydrogen and/or light radicals are supplied to a stock heating and cracking zone for the reaction; the reaction products are supplied to the separation stage; a portion of gas and light fractions and also unreacted hydrogen and/or light hydrogenous initial mediums after the separation stage are supplied to the start of the process and introduced into the charge stock, light end fractions of reaction after the separation stage mainly with end boiling point to 350-360C, partially or completely supplied on the stage of producing light end commodity products (condensed gas, petrol, kerosene, diesel fuel) and/or partially returned and introduced into charge stock, heavy remains after the separation stage mainly with start boiling point 360C and above, are partially or completely supplied for producing heavy commodity products (bitumen, coke), and, probably, partially or completely supplied for reprocessing by the given method to the start of the process together with charge stock; the stock and/or separation remain cracking and heating stages, hydrogen and/or hydrogenous medium and catalyst heating, production of active atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals and separation into light portion and heavy remains are combined in one device, and the ratio of the surface of the reactor or reactors with the catalyst to volume of the stock heating and/or cracking shall be increased so that maximally increase the interaction (reaction) area of atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals and heated or cracked hydrocarbon stock for effective utilisation of reacting products. The invention also concerns a unit for preparation and fine processing of hydrocarbon stock. ^ EFFECT: higher yield of light end products. ^ 19 cl, 3 tbl, 15 dwg

CN121181269A.title: Magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat-insulating material for low-temperature heat-insulating container and preparation method of magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat-insulating material
CN121181269A.abstract: The invention discloses a magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat insulation material and a preparation method thereof. The preparation method comprises the following steps: taking expanded perlite as a matrix, and constructing a core-shell structure step by step through a sol-gel method: firstly, in an acidic environment with the pH value of 3-5, taking 0.2-0.4 mol/L of FeCl3. 6H2O and FeCl2. 3H2O as precursors, forming a Fe3O4 magnetic inner layer with the thickness of 50 +/-5nm through hydrothermal deposition, and realizing magnetic suspension response within 20s under the magnetic field intensity of 0.5-1.5 T; taking tetraethoxysilane (TEOS) and fluorosilane as raw materials, and roasting at 400 +/-10 DEG C to form a water contact angle gt; and a SiO2 super-hydrophobic shell at 150 DEG C can effectively block water molecule permeation. The obtained material has magnetic control positioning and super-hydrophobic characteristics, keeps stable heat insulation performance in a liquid hydrogen environment at the temperature of-253 DEG C, overcomes the problem of low-temperature heat insulation failure caused by moisture permeation of traditional pearlife, and is suitable for a low-temperature liquid storage tank system.

CN121184352A.abstract: The invention provides a diaphragm testing device and method for a hydrogen diaphragm type compressor, and the device comprises a hydrogen source, a fatigue stretching assembly and a recovery tank, hydrogen in the hydrogen source enters the fatigue stretching assembly after being pressurized, and the fatigue stretching assembly is used for driving a testing diaphragm to move up and down in a hydrogen environment. The recovery tank is used for recovering hydrogen flowing out of the fatigue stretching assembly, the fatigue stretching assembly comprises a stretching rod, a piston connected to the bottom end of the stretching rod and arranged in the test membrane cavity and an electric cylinder connected to the top end of the stretching rod, and the electric cylinder is used for driving the stretching rod to drive the piston to move up and down in the test membrane cavity in the vertical direction; and a dynamic load is applied to the diaphragm in the test diaphragm cavity. CN121093692A.title: Crystal plasticity and cohesion model coupling hydrogen induced cracking simulation method based on test
CN121093692A.abstract: The invention discloses a test-based crystal plasticity and cohesion model coupling hydrogen induced cracking simulation method, which comprises the following steps: carrying out a hydrogen filling mechanical property test on a metal material to obtain a true stress-true strain curve of the metal material in a hydrogen environment; carrying out a hydrogen-filled fracture toughness test on the metal material to obtain a stress intensity factor of the metal material in a hydrogen environment; constructing a cohesion constitutive model; a metal material electron back scattering diffraction microscopic characterization test is carried out, microstructure characteristics are obtained, and a polycrystalline model is constructed; constructing a crystal plastic constitutive model; coupling crystal plasticity constitutive and cohesion constitutive, and calibrating crystal plasticity to-be-determined parameters by adopting a trial-and-error method; and carrying out finite element simulation analysis on hydrogen-induced cracking behaviors with different microstructure characteristics in a hydrogen environment to obtain stress-strain data and crack data of the hydrogen-induced cracking behaviors. According to the invention, high-precision simulation of the hydrogen-induced cracking micromechanism of the metal material in the hydrogen environment is realized.

CN121160185A.abstract: The invention relates to the field of composite materials, and discloses an anti-hydrogen permeation composite coating as well as a preparation method and application thereof. The hydrogen permeation resistant composite coating is prepared from the following raw materials: epoxy resin, carboxyl-terminated liquid nitrile rubber, polyhedral oligomeric silsesquioxane and an ionic liquid modified layered nano composite material. Wherein the layered nano composite material is graphite phase carbon nitride and/or cobalt-aluminum double metal hydroxide; and the thickness of the layered nano composite material is 2 to 100 nm. According to the present invention, the coating material with characteristics of excellent internal resistance reducing effect and hydrogen permeation resistance is prepared mainly through the design of the polymer matrix material and the compounding of the functional filler, and can be used in all devices and pipelines in the hydrogen environment, such that the intrinsic safety performance is improved, and the service life is prolonged.

CN121137509A.title: High-temperature hydrogen GETTER device based on surface passivation barrier layer
CN121137509A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of gas purification, and particularly relates to a high-temperature hydrogen GETTER device based on a surface passivation barrier layer. A compact Cr2O3 passivation barrier layer formed through high-temperature oxidation pretreatment is arranged on the surface of a pressure-bearing metal component in the device, and the thickness of the compact Cr2O3 passivation barrier layer is 0.5-5 microns. The pretreatment process comprises the following steps of: performing surface finishing to ensure that the roughness Ra is less than or equal to 0.4 mu m, heating to 850-1050 DEG C at the speed of 5-10 DEG C/min in an inert atmosphere with the vacuum degree of less than or equal to 10 <-3 > mbar or the dew point of less than or equal to-40 DEG C, preserving heat for 1-4 hours, and cooling to 200 DEG C or below at the speed of less than or equal to 5 DEG C/min. The device further comprises a multi-stage purging system, a uniform flow channel design is adopted, and ultra-pure hydrogen with the methane content smaller than or equal to 0.1 ppb is used as purging gas. The hydrogen permeation path is fundamentally blocked, the methane content of an outlet can be stably controlled below 1ppb in the hydrogen environment of 600 DEG C and 10 bar, the hydrogen corrosion resistance of equipment is remarkably improved, the service life of the equipment is remarkably prolonged, and the hydrogen permeation device is suitable for the fields of semiconductor manufacturing, new energy and the like with extremely high hydrogen purity requirements.

CN121007767A.title: Method and system for synergistically testing and evaluating fatigue and fracture of metal material in hydrogen environment
CN121007767A.abstract: The invention relates to a hydrogen environment metal material fatigue and fracture cooperative test and evaluation method and system, and belongs to the field of metal material hydrogen environment compatibility. The method comprises the following steps: performing a fatigue crack propagation test and a fracture toughness test on a fatigue and fracture synergistic test sample in a hydrogen environment with preset pressure and preset temperature; based on the obtained fatigue crack propagation curve and the obtained crack propagation resistance curve, obtaining a fatigue crack propagation fitting curve and a fracture toughness characteristic value in the hydrogen environment with the preset pressure and the preset temperature; and based on the fatigue crack propagation fitting curve and the fracture toughness characteristic value in the hydrogen environment with the preset pressure and the preset temperature, safety evaluation of the metal material simulated hydrogen conveying pipeline under the fatigue load working condition is completed. The fatigue crack test is replaced by the fracture toughness test according to the defect length, the fatigue and fracture cooperative test is realized, the sample replacement is not needed, the test material is saved, the test preparation time for the sample replacement and cooling process is reduced, and the test efficiency is improved.

CN120934218A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of motor iron core structures, in particular to a hydrogen circulating pump stator iron core structure adopting 0.05 mm silicon steel sheets. CN120844024A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of compressor cylinder body surface coating, and discloses a high-pressure piston type hydrogen compressor cylinder body surface PVD preparation process which comprises the following steps: step 1, matrix laser microtexturing and plasma activation: machining micro-pit arrays on the surfaces of a cylinder sleeve and a piston by adopting a pulse fiber laser; and the oxide layer is removed through Ar < + >/H2 mixed plasma etching, and a nanoscale activated surface is generated. CN120801161A.title: Intelligent agent test equipment for intelligently and efficiently evaluating fatigue crack growth rate of hydrogen pipeline steel and use method of intelligent agent test equipment
CN120801161A.abstract: The invention relates to intelligent agent test equipment for intelligently and efficiently evaluating the fatigue crack growth rate of hydrogen pipeline steel and a use method of the intelligent agent test equipment. The problem that the fatigue crack growth rate test efficiency of a material is low under the gaseous hydrogen environment and the fatigue coupling effect is solved. The equipment mainly comprises a high-purity N2 gas cylinder, a high-purity H2 gas cylinder, a hydrogen-doped gas cylinder I, a hydrogen-doped gas cylinder II, an electromagnetic valve I, an electromagnetic valve II, an electromagnetic valve III, an electromagnetic valve IV, a gas inlet pipeline, a vacuum pump, a vacuum gauge, a pressure gauge, a high-pressure hydrogen environment fatigue crack growth rate performance test system and an artificial intelligence decision and control system. Multi-field coupling conditions such as stress amplitude, frequency, pressure and hydrogen doping ratio can be integrated, and the crack propagation behavior of a pipeline steel material in an actual hydrogen service environment can be simulated. A direct-current potential drop device is used for monitoring the fatigue crack propagation state in real time, an artificial intelligence model is embedded at the same time, and load, environment and crack data collected in real time are subjected to online analysis.

CN120777373A.title: Hydrogen embrittlement-resistant double-piston-effect high-pressure ball valve and intelligent pressure relief method thereof
CN120777373A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of sealing valves, in particular to a hydrogen embrittlement-resistant double-piston-effect high-pressure ball valve and an intelligent pressure relief method thereof, and can solve the problems that a traditional high-pressure ball valve is poor in sealing performance, difficult to adapt to pressure change, incapable of meeting the intelligent characteristic, difficult to achieve accurate pressure control and poor in pressure relief effect to a certain extent. The hydrogen embrittlement failure is easily caused. According to the intelligent pressure relief method, the pressure gradient is monitored in real time through a piezoelectric sensor; and when the pressure is 2.0 MPa, the piezoelectric actuator expands the hole diameter of the discharge hole. According to the invention, the overpressure explosion risk of a valve cavity is solved, a hydrogen permeation path is blocked, hydrogen embrittlement is eliminated, and 15,000 times of zero-leakage circulation in a 70MPa hydrogen environment is realized.

CN120801387A.abstract: The invention relates to a neutron diffraction testing device and method for a hydrogen storage material in a liquid hydrogen environment, in particular to the technical field of hydrogen storage material testing, and the neutron diffraction testing device comprises a neutron diffraction testing unit and a liquid hydrogen environment providing unit arranged between radial collimators of the neutron diffraction testing unit; the liquid hydrogen environment providing unit comprises a hydrogen end, a liquid helium end, a liquid hydrogen environment end and a gas recovery end; the hydrogen end is connected with the liquid hydrogen environment end through the heat exchanger; the liquid helium end is connected with a cold medium channel of the heat exchanger; and a hydrogen outlet of the liquid hydrogen environment end is connected with the gas recovery end. According to the neutron diffraction testing device for the hydrogen storage material in the liquid hydrogen environment, provided by the invention, the liquid hydrogen environment unit is introduced into the testing device, so that neutron diffraction testing of the hydrogen storage material in the dynamic hydrogen absorption/desorption or service process in the liquid hydrogen environment is realized, and crystal structure evolution information and related information such as material stress and strain are obtained; therefore, the performance characterization accuracy of the hydrogen storage material is improved.

CN120741142A.title: Hydrogen environment metal material constant load testing device and CTOD-based testing method
CN120741142A.abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen environment metal material constant load testing device and a CTOD-based testing method.The high-pressure gas storage bin in the device is connected with an upper bin cover and a lower bin cover in a sealed mode, the upper bin cover is provided with a gas inlet pipeline, the lower bin cover is provided with a gas outlet pipeline, the high-pressure gas storage bin is filled with hydrogen, the upper bin cover is provided with an upper loading rod, and the upper loading rod is provided with a lower loading rod; the upper end of the upper loading rod is connected with a mechanical testing machine loading head, the lower end of the loading rod extends into the high-pressure gas storage bin, a load sensor is installed on the upper loading rod in the high-pressure gas storage bin, a lower loading rod is arranged on the lower bin cover, the upper end of the lower loading rod extends into the high-pressure gas storage bin, and the lower end of the lower loading rod is connected with a mechanical testing machine base. A constant-load sample is connected between the upper loading rod and the lower loading rod, an extensometer is mounted on the constant-load sample, and a temperature sensor and a pressure sensor are mounted in the high-pressure gas storage bin. The device can effectively provide a high-pressure hydrogen test environment, the method is not limited by the wall thickness of the pipe, and the fracture toughness value of the sample in the hydrogen environment is obtained.

CN120736996A.title: Method for preparing p-aminobenzoic acid through chlorination, hydrolysis and hydrogenation of p-nitrotoluene
CN120736996A.abstract: The invention provides a method for preparing p-aminobenzoic acid through chlorination, hydrolysis and hydrogenation of p-nitrotoluene, and belongs to the technical field of organic compound preparation. Comprising the following steps: melting p-nitrotoluene, and performing chlorination reaction under the catalysis of azodiisobutyronitrile to generate a chlorinated product containing p-nitrobenzyl chloride; mixing the chlorination product with liquid caustic soda and sodium hypochlorite for hydrolysis reaction, separating liquid after reaction, and acidifying an upper-layer water phase to obtain p-nitrobenzoic acid; the method comprises the following steps: mixing p-nitrobenzoic acid with methanol and a Pd/C catalyst, carrying out hydrogenation reaction in a hydrogen environment, and filtering, distilling, cooling, centrifuging and drying after the reaction to obtain p-aminobenzoic acid. The method is simple in process route, mild in reaction condition, high in product purity, high in yield and suitable for industrial production, raw materials are easy to obtain, hydrogen chloride gas generated in the chlorination reaction and p-nitrotoluene obtained after the hydrolysis reaction are recycled, cyclic utilization of resources is achieved, and the production cost is reduced.

CN120727124A.title: Mode-adjustable fracture phase field simulation method considering hydrogen concentration driving mechanism
CN120727124A.abstract: The invention relates to the field of hydrogen induced fracture, and particularly discloses a mode-adjustable fracture phase field simulation method considering a hydrogen concentration driving mechanism, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining material parameters of a test piece; obtaining constitutive equations of stress, phase field and chemical potential through a non-equilibrium state energy dissipation equation; obtaining evolution equations and boundary conditions of the mechanical field, the phase field and the chemical field; establishing a hydrogen-assisted fracture phase field model; establishing a hydrogen embrittlement fracture phase field model with an adjustable mode; obtaining the change relation of the initial deflection angle of the crack along with the weight coefficient; and obtaining results of stress distribution, phase field variables, crack initiation and expansion evolution. Effective regulation and control of the initial deflection angle of the mixed type crack in the hydrogen environment are achieved, comparison verification is conducted on the initial deflection angle and test data, meanwhile, relative contribution of ball quantity and deviator crack driving energy is considered, accurate evaluation of the initiation and expansion path of the mixed type crack is achieved, and the method is suitable for popularization and application. Therefore, an effective method is provided for accurate prediction and mechanism explanation of complex hydrogen embrittlement fracture behaviors.

CN120741283A.abstract: The invention discloses a full-size pressure regulator hydrogen permeation and pressure regulating performance testing integrated device which comprises hydrogen/hydrogen-doped natural gas, a gas source, a valve set, a tee joint, a pressure gauge set, a pipeline, a sealing clamp, a pressure regulator, a gas chromatograph and a vacuum pump. CN120741215A.title: Method for testing hydrogen induced cracking of material in high-pressure hydrogen environment
CN120741215A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of material testing, and discloses a method for testing hydrogen induced cracking of a material in a high-pressure hydrogen environment, which comprises the following steps: firstly, preparing an extended compact tensile sample based on size data of a standard wedge-shaped opening loading sample and a standard compact tensile sample; then carrying out fatigue crack prefabrication on the extended compact tensile sample through a fatigue testing machine, and carrying out shape conversion to obtain a standard wedge-shaped opening loading sample with fatigue cracks, and taking the standard wedge-shaped opening loading sample as a target wedge-shaped opening loading sample; applying a load to the tail end of the fatigue crack on the target wedge-shaped opening loading sample, and placing the target wedge-shaped opening loading sample in a high-pressure hydrogen environment to determine the length of the current hydrogen-induced crack; and finally, determining a stress intensity factor threshold value of the to-be-tested material according to the initial applied stress intensity factor, the current hydrogen-induced crack length and the standard value of the hydrogen-induced crack length. According to the method, not only can a more accurate hydrogen-induced delayed cracking stress intensity factor threshold value be obtained, but also the test cost can be effectively reduced.

CN120662812A.title: Sintering method for alternately strengthening oxygen reduction in vacuum and hydrogen environments
CN120662812A.abstract: The invention relates to a sintering method for alternately strengthening oxygen reduction in a vacuum and hydrogen environment, which comprises the following steps: uniformly doping organic carbon into a metal powder raw material, utilizing the characteristics of high-temperature volatilization and decomposition of the organic carbon, heating the organic carbon to volatilize or decompose the organic carbon into CO, CO2, H2O and other gases in a presintering stage, and forming through open pores in a metal blank after overflowing. The pore structure provides a channel penetrating into the green body for hydrogen, so that the hydrogen can be directly subjected to reduction reaction with metal oxide in the green body, and the problem that the oxide in the green body is difficult to fully reduce due to limited mass transfer in the traditional process is effectively solved. In the reduction process, vacuum hydrogen circulation deoxidation can be carried out for multiple times according to the requirement of a sintered product on oxygen element; in the high-temperature sintering process, a vacuum dehydrogenation method can be carried out according to the requirement of the sintered product on the hydrogen element, the oxygen and hydrogen element content of the final product is reduced, and the comprehensive performance of the sintered product is improved.

CN120706138A.title: Submarine pipeline steel hydrogen-induced fatigue crack propagation prediction method based on hydrogen-induced dislocation pinning-unpinning mechanism
CN120706138A.abstract: The invention discloses a subsea pipeline steel hydrogen-induced fatigue crack propagation prediction method based on a hydrogen-induced dislocation pinning-unpinning mechanism, and the method comprises the steps: constructing a four-stage nonlinear constitutive model of a pipeline steel material in a given hydrogen environment; the four-stage nonlinear constitutive model comprises constitutive relation equations of different stages, which are respectively constructed in four stages of pinning hardening, platform, nail removal and post-nail-removal hardening based on elastic-plastic mechanical behaviors of the pipeline steel material; and endowing the pipeline steel material in the constructed finite element model with the four-stage nonlinear constitutive model, and carrying out pipeline steel hydrogen-induced fatigue crack propagation prediction. According to the method, the staged nonlinear elastic-plastic constitutive model is constructed on the basis of the mechanical property change of the pipeline steel in the hydrogen environment due to hydrogen-induced dislocation pinning and nail disengaging, and the model is used for predicting the hydrogen-induced fatigue crack propagation of the subsea pipeline steel, so that the prediction precision of the crack propagation behavior of the material in the hydrogen environment is remarkably improved.

CN120684817A.title: Alpine region hydrogen-containing comprehensive energy system using vortex tube
CN120684817A.abstract: The invention discloses an alpine region hydrogen-containing comprehensive energy system applying a vortex tube and a dispatching method. The system comprises an electrolytic bath, a compressor, a hydrogen storage tank, the vortex tube, a hot end heat exchanger, a heat storage tank, a cold end heat exchanger, a cold storage tank, a hydrogen fuel cell and a demand side. And the demand side comprises an alpine region oxygen environment, an alpine region hydrogen environment and hydrogen-doped natural gas users. According to the comprehensive energy system, oxygen prepared in an electrolytic cell is directly fed into an oxygen demand side, hydrogen enters a vortex tube through pressurization storage, energy separation is carried out in the vortex tube, cold and hot hydrogen flow division is achieved, different hydrogen flows of the vortex tube can be adjusted and changed, efficient distribution of hydrogen energy is achieved, and the overall economical efficiency is improved. According to the comprehensive energy system, the energy utilization efficiency and flexibility can be greatly improved, the special geographical environment requirements of the alpine region are met, and the energy self-sufficiency and emergency guarantee capacity is enhanced.

CN120668564A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-pressure hydrogen environment box and a test method for balancing pressure and reducing friction. The environment box comprises a test box body and a gas chamber, a sealing cavity is formed in the test box body; the air chamber is arranged on the test box body in a penetrating mode to form an upper air chamber and a lower air chamber, the upper air chamber and the lower air chamber are communicated with the internal sealing cavity, an upper piston rod is fixedly installed in the upper air chamber, and a lower piston rod is arranged in the lower air chamber in a sliding mode. CN120609725A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of hydrogen energy conveying and material performance testing, in particular to a testing structure for hydrogen permeation testing in a high-pressure gas-phase hydrogen environment and an installation method and application of the testing structure. CN120608248A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of metal materials, and discloses high-nitrogen austenitic stainless steel for an ultralow-temperature environment and a preparation method thereof. CN223307961U.title: Experiment table for testing high-temperature and high-pressure hydrogen environment
CN223307961U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of experiment machines, in particular to a high-temperature and high-pressure hydrogen environment test experiment table, which not only collects hydrogen after an experiment is completed, facilitates subsequent continuous utilization and improves the utilization rate of the hydrogen, but also performs multiple protection measures on the device, avoids hydrogen leakage and improves the safety of the device. Comprising an experiment table; the device further comprises a protection mechanism, a sealing mechanism, an experiment mechanism, an inflation mechanism and a gas storage mechanism, the protection mechanism is installed on the experiment table and avoids explosion caused by hydrogen leakage, the sealing mechanism is installed on the experiment table and avoids hydrogen leakage, and the experiment mechanism is installed on the experiment table and conducts a clamping test on a workpiece. The inflation mechanism is installed on the experiment table and heats and conveys hydrogen into the experiment table, and the gas storage mechanism is installed on the inflation mechanism and pumps out and stores the hydrogen after an experiment is completed.

CN120555479A.title: Construction method and application of heat-resistant yeast for synthesizing mannitol
CN120555479A.abstract: The invention relates to heat-resistant yeast for synthesizing mannitol as well as a construction method and application of the heat-resistant yeast. According to the invention, firstly, Kluyveromyces marxianus is used as a chassis to screen five kinds of mannitol synthesis related genes from different sources, wherein the mannitol yield of the strain is the highest when CmMDH is over-expressed. And then, promoting the expression of the NADPH synthetic gene by increasing the copy number of the CmMDH and overexpression, so as to obtain the strain Y2CmMDH-KmUTR1 with higher yield. The production of the mannitol is further promoted by subsequently improving the oxygen introduction and pH (Potential of Hydrogen) environment. According to the invention, the yeast strain for efficiently producing the mannitol at 42 DEG C is constructed for the first time, and the mannitol is produced by using the molasses and the jerusalem artichoke without adding extra enzymes. The method has important significance for realizing industrial production of mannitol and recycling of agricultural wastes through a microbial synthesis method.

JP2025117356A.title: HYDROGEN SHIELDING FILM
JP2025117356A.abstract: To provide a hydrogen shielding film that can suppress hydrogen embrittlement of a structural material for a long term under a hydrogen environment.SOLUTION: A hydrogen shielding film is constituted of a multilayer film laminated on an outside surface of a structural material comprising a metal and/or an alloy which are susceptible to hydrogen embrittlement. The number of layers constituting the multilayer film is at least two. The number of layers constituting the multilayer film laminated in part of the region of the outside surface of the structural material is different from the number of layers constituting the multilayer film laminated in the other regions of the outside surface of the structural material. In a hydrogen-resistant structural material, the whole outside surface of the structural material is coated on the hydrogen shielding film.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

CN120383479A.title: High-strength boron carbide composite material and preparation method thereof
CN120383479A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of composite materials, and particularly relates to a high-strength boron carbide composite material and a preparation method thereof.The preparation method comprises the following steps that S1, modification of titanium boride whiskers is conducted, specifically, the titanium boride whiskers, silicon powder and a grinding aid are put into a ball milling tank, ball milling, cleaning and drying are conducted, and the modified titanium boride whiskers are obtained; s2, preparation of composite material powder: mixing phenolic resin, boron carbide powder and deionized water, performing primary ball milling, then adding the modified titanium boride whisker, performing secondary ball milling, drying, and performing tertiary ball milling to obtain the composite material powder; and S3, sintering of the composite material: pressing the powder into blocks, drying moisture, pyrolyzing in a hydrogen environment, then coating with silicon powder, and sintering in vacuum. Titanium boride whiskers are adopted as a toughening and reinforcing component to reinforce and toughen the boron carbide composite material, and a liquid phase siliconizing sintering method is adopted to immerse the silicon element into the composite material system, so that the composite material is obtained. And silicon carbide can be generated in situ in the composite material, so that composite toughening of titanium boride and silicon carbide is realized.

CN120385577A.title: Low-temperature high-pressure hydrogen environment mechanical test bed
CN120385577A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of test devices, and provides a low-temperature high-pressure hydrogen environment mechanical test bench, which comprises a hydrogen environment device, a refrigeration device and a test device, and is characterized in that the hydrogen environment device comprises a hydrogen environment box and a hydrogen supply mechanism, and the hydrogen supply mechanism supplies hydrogen to the hydrogen environment box; the refrigerating device refrigerates the hydrogen environment box; the testing device comprises a testing clamp, a transmission rod and a driving mechanism, the transmission rod is arranged in the hydrogen environment box in a reciprocating sliding mode, the first end of the transmission rod extends into the hydrogen environment box, the second end of the transmission rod extends out of the hydrogen environment box, the testing clamp comprises a first clamping part and a second clamping part, and the first clamping part is fixed relative to the hydrogen environment box; the second clamping part is connected with the first end of the transmission rod. The driving mechanism drives the transmission rod to slide back and forth. Therefore, a low-temperature and high-pressure hydrogen environment can be provided in combination with the refrigeration device and the hydrogen supply mechanism, the to-be-tested material is mounted on the test fixture, and tension or pressure can be applied to the to-be-tested material by utilizing the driving mechanism, so that the mechanical property test of the to-be-tested material can be completed.

CN120403993A.abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen environment sealing structure leakage characteristic test system, and relates to the technical field of gas leakage monitoring, the hydrogen environment sealing structure leakage characteristic test system comprises a gas supply assembly, a leakage assembly, a sealing structure, a multi-parameter measurement assembly and a hydrogen leakage rate measurement assembly, the gas supply assembly comprises a hydrogen storage container and a gas filling pipeline, the hydrogen storage container is used for storing hydrogen, and the gas filling pipeline is used for filling gas; a gas outlet of the hydrogen storage container is communicated with a first end of the gas filling pipeline, the leakage assembly comprises a leakage joint, the leakage joint is communicated with a second end of the gas filling pipeline, and the leakage joint is used for leaking hydrogen into the sealing structure; the multi-parameter measuring assembly comprises multiple different types of measuring devices and is used for measuring different parameters of leaked hydrogen in the sealing structure, and the hydrogen leakage rate measuring assembly is connected with the sealing structure and is used for measuring the hydrogen leakage rate. CN120369457A.title: Method and device for detecting hydrogen embrittlement resistance of high-entropy alloy based on machine learning driving
CN120369457A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of high-entropy alloy hydrogen embrittlement resistance detection, and discloses a high-entropy alloy hydrogen embrittlement resistance detection method and device based on machine learning driving, and the method comprises the steps of calculation of elongation at break, setting of an elongation at break threshold and comparison of the elongation at break and the threshold. According to the method, the brittleness resistance of the high-entropy alloy in the hydrogen environment is evaluated through the unified standard elongation at break, and the detection reliability and comparability can be ensured regardless of the sample size. Compared with the direct comparison of the fracture length, the fracture elongation is not influenced by the sample size, so that the samples with different sizes can be evaluated under the unified standard, and the error caused by the size difference of the samples is avoided.

CN120369790A.title: High-temperature electrochemical hydrogen charging method suitable for 316L stainless steel
CN120369790A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of hydrogen behavior tests in metal materials, and particularly relates to a high-temperature electrochemical hydrogen charging method suitable for 316L stainless steel. The method provided by the invention is scientific and reasonable in design, and is a high-temperature electrochemical hydrogen charging method taking the mixed molten salt of NaHSO4.H2O and KHSO4 in a mass ratio of 1: 1 as the electrolyte. Compared with normal-temperature electrochemical hydrogen charging which takes H2SO4 as an electrolyte and high-temperature and high-pressure hydrogen charging which is carried out in a hydrogen environment by utilizing a high-pressure kettle in the current 316L stainless steel hydrogen embrittlement research, the method disclosed by the invention not only improves the problem of low efficiency of normal-temperature electrochemical hydrogen charging, but also solves the safety problem of high-temperature and high-pressure electrochemical hydrogen charging; according to the method, high-concentration hydrogen can be introduced into the 316L stainless steel, so that the 316L stainless steel is obviously embrittled.

CN120329027A.title: Titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder, titanium zirconium oxide target material and preparation method of titanium zirconium oxide target material
CN120329027A.abstract: The invention discloses titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder, a titanium zirconium oxide target material and a preparation method of the titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder and the titanium zirconium oxide target material, and belongs to the technical field of plasma powder preparation. The titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder provided by the invention is prepared by the following steps: mixing zirconium oxide and titanium oxide according to a certain mass ratio, presintering, crushing, mixing the crushed titanium zirconium oxide and water according to a certain mass ratio, grinding, sintering in a vacuum environment or a hydrogen environment, crushing and screening after sintering, and thus obtaining the titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder. The prepared titanium zirconium oxide has a suitable apparent density range, excellent flowability and a relatively high spraying deposition rate. Meanwhile, no other metal powder or binder is added in the preparation process of the titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder provided by the invention, so that the preparation cost can be effectively reduced, and the production efficiency can be improved. Furthermore, when the titanium zirconium oxide spraying powder provided by the invention is used for preparing a titanium zirconium oxide target material, the obtained titanium zirconium oxide target material is high in density and low in resistivity.

CN120366665A.title: High-strength and high-toughness steel suitable for high-humidity and harsh hydrogen environment and preparation method of high-strength and high-toughness steel
CN120366665A.abstract: The invention relates to high-toughness steel adapting to a high-damp-heat harsh hydrogen environment and a preparation method, and belongs to the technical field of steel preparation. The high strength and toughness steel comprises the following chemical components in percentage by mass: 0.40%-0.55% of C, 0.20%-1.50% of Si, 0.55%-1.50% of Mn, 0.70%-1.50% of Cr, 0.50%-1.50% of Ni, 0.15%-0.35% of Mo, 0.025%-0.065% of Al, less than or equal to 0.015% of P, less than or equal to 0.010% of S and the balance of Fe and inevitable impurities. By optimizing the alloy element ratio and synergistic effect, the strength, toughness and delayed fracture resistance of the steel are remarkably improved, and the long-life service requirement of the steel in the severe hydrogen environment is met at the strength level of 1200-1400 MPa.

CN120340981A.title: Rare earth permanent magnet material composition design for extreme environment
CN120340981A.abstract: The invention discloses component design of a rare earth permanent magnet material for an extreme environment, and belongs to the field of rare earth permanent magnet materials. According to the invention, Sm, Co and Cu elementary substances are used as raw materials, and samarium cobalt-based rare earth permanent magnet material powder with Cu-doped chemical components is prepared through electric arc melting and physical crushing processes. The samarium-cobalt-based permanent magnet material has good hydrogen resistance, and the problem that the SmCo5 alloy has high hydrogen absorption capacity in a hydrogen environment is solved. According to the method, the hydrogen resistance of the SmCo5-based permanent magnet can be effectively improved, the comprehensive magnetic performance of the SmCo5-based permanent magnet is also improved, and meanwhile, the cost is reduced by replacing part of Co with Cu. The preparation can be completed by using conventional equipment, the process is simple, and a new feasible method is provided for the development of the hydrogen-resistant SmCo5 magnet.

CN120285965A.title: Preparation and test method of In2O3-rGO-PPy aerogel for rapidly detecting hydrogen at room temperature
CN120285965A.abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method and a test method of In2O3-rGO-PPy aerogel for rapidly detecting hydrogen at room temperature. The preparation method comprises the following specific steps: mixing CO (NH2) 2, In (NO3) 3.4. 5H2O and NH4F, reacting in a reaction kettle, washing and purifying after the reaction is completed, and annealing at 400 DEG C for 1-2 hours to prepare indium oxide (In2O3) nanoparticles; the preparation method comprises the following steps: preparing methyl orange, FeCl3. 6H2O and pyrrole into a mixed solution, standing to obtain a product, washing and purifying, and finally freeze-drying to obtain a polypyrrole (PPy) tube; the preparation method comprises the following steps: dissolving graphene oxide, polypyrrole and indium oxide in deionized water, carrying out ultrasonic treatment in an ice bath, carrying out a hydrothermal reaction to obtain composite hydrogel, washing and purifying the composite hydrogel, and finally carrying out freeze drying to obtain the three-dimensional In2O3-rGO-PPy aerogel. The innovative overall testing method is used for testing the sensor, a metal sheet and a wire are connected to the two ends of aerogel, the aerogel is integrally placed in a gas chamber, the introduction amount of hydrogen and air is controlled, a hydrogen environment with a certain concentration is kept, and the sensor is tested under the condition.

CN120257731A.title: Method for analyzing sealing performance of ultralow-temperature aviation liquid hydrogen floating ball valve
CN120257731A.abstract: The invention discloses a sealing performance analysis method for an ultralow-temperature aviation liquid hydrogen floating ball valve. The method comprises the steps that materials of a ball valve seat and a ball body are determined; simplifying the contact between the ball body and the valve seat to obtain a sealing structure model; setting different pressure angles for the sealing structure model to obtain a change result of the path sealing specific pressure of the sealing surface; the optimal pressure angle of the valve seat is determined according to the change result of the path sealing specific pressure of the sealing surface; and based on the optimal pressure angle, the change of the sealing specific pressure under different sealing surface widths is analyzed, and the optimal sealing surface width of the valve seat is determined. According to the method, the influence of different pressure angles and sealing surface widths on the sealing performance in the ultralow-temperature liquid hydrogen environment can be analyzed, and technical reference is provided for design of the ultralow-temperature aviation liquid hydrogen ball valve.

CN120213746A.title: Metal material hydrogen compatibility simulation test method based on hydrogen content
CN120213746A.abstract: The invention discloses a metal material hydrogen compatibility simulation test method based on hydrogen content. The method comprises the following steps: S1, sample preparation; s2, charging hydrogen in a high-pressure hydrogen environment; s3, diffusible hydrogen is measured; s4, preparing an electrochemical hydrogen charging solution; s5, carrying out hydrogen charging by using an electrochemical hydrogen charging solution; s6, storing the sample; s7, drawing a hydrogen concentration change curve; s8, electrogalvanizing process parameters are set; s9, performing hydrogen charging in a simulated high-pressure hydrogen environment; s10, the sample is galvanized; s11, carrying out a slow tensile test and a fracture toughness test on the sample; and S12, evaluating the high-pressure hydrogen embrittlement of the sample based on the results of the slow tensile test and the fracture toughness test. According to the method, the hydrogen embrittlement performance of the material under different hydrogen pressure environments can be obtained, and the influence of the influence factors on the high-pressure hydrogen embrittlement performance of the steel can be analyzed in combination with the process, alloy components and stress states of the steel.

CN120176888A.title: Load sensor structure resistant to high-pressure hydrogen environment
CN120176888A.abstract: The invention belongs to the field of design and manufacture of high-pressure hydrogen storage containers, and discloses a load sensor resistant to influence of a high-pressure hydrogen environment, which adopts a linear variable differential transformer (LVDT) to replace a strain gauge to serve as a sensitive element for measuring deformation, adopts a material resistant to hydrogen embrittlement to manufacture a sensor elastic body, and connects the LVDT with the elastic body through a thread and tenon structure. During use, the elastic body is connected with a tested sample, an excitation signal is applied to the LVDT, and the magnitude of the load borne by the elastic body can be reflected by collecting a feedback signal of the LVDT. According to the invention, the problem of signal drift of a current load sensor in a high-pressure hydrogen environment is effectively solved, and the problem of inaccurate test results of basic mechanical properties of a material in the hydrogen environment is solved.

CN120333725A.abstract: The invention provides an air tightness detection device and method for a metal hose in a hydrogen environment, and relates to the technical field of hose detection equipment. The device comprises a metal hose, the two ends of the metal hose are sealed, hydrogen with preset pressure is contained in the metal hose, and the fixed end of the metal hose is fixedly arranged; the vertical moving assembly comprises a vertical sliding rail and a pair of vertical sliding tables arranged on the vertical sliding rail in a sliding mode. One end of each telescopic piece is connected with the vertical sliding table; three end parts of the connecting piece are respectively hinged with the pair of telescopic pieces and the swinging end of the metal hose; and the detection end of the pressure detection piece is arranged in the metal hose. CN120170320A.title: High-entropy alloy flux-cored wire, preparation method and method for preparing hydrogen embrittlement-resistant high-entropy alloy coating
CN120170320A.abstract: The high-entropy alloy flux-cored wire comprises a flux core and a welding skin, the flux core is composed of, by mass, 5%-10% of Co, 10%-20% of Cr, 10%-15% of Ni, 20%-30% of Al, 15%-35% of Mn and 1%-5% of La2O3, and the sum of the mass percentages of the components is 100%. The invention further discloses a preparation method of the high-entropy alloy flux-cored wire, the flux-cored powder is wrapped in the FeCoNi strip, the FeCoNi strip is closed, a welding wire precursor is subjected to multi-pass cold-drawing and diameter-reducing wire-drawing die, and finally the high-entropy alloy flux-cored wire is obtained through straightening, disc forming and sealed packaging. When the high-entropy alloy flux-cored wire is used for a hydrogen embrittlement-resistant coating on the inner surface of a stainless steel hydrogen storage tank, the hydrogen permeation resistance and hydrogen embrittlement resistance effects are remarkably improved compared with a stainless steel substrate, and the problem that the stainless steel hydrogen storage tank is prone to hydrogen embrittlement under long-term high-pressure, low-temperature and hydrogen environment exposure can be effectively solved.

WO2025116184A1.abstract: The present invention relates to a hydrogen storage composite and a manufacturing method thereof. More specifically, the hydrogen storage composite of the present invention has a form in which a hydrogen permeation and oxidation prevention film for selectively separating only hydrogen molecules surrounds hydrogen storage particles, and is a composite in which an existing hydrogen purification process and a storage process are unified.
